user_reviews: [{"Name":"Donald Roach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLX3r5XrDxYrbM29yBwWbJiZopsRhjzyIBbLZnrqaDzwGpJHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It was recommended to me that I attend the Anaheim club for alcoholism. I arrived today for my first 10 AM meeting. Upon entering the room, where the meeting was to take place, there was the leader and three other men. I immediately greeted all of them with a hello. I was shocked when none of them responded. It was so awkward that I immediately turned around and left. I knew immediately that this was not the place where I needed to find fellowship for my sobriety. I was really sad. I am a very friendly person and I go out of my way to try to make others feel comfortable. If anybody bothers to read this review, I would simply encourage the individuals who attend this meeting to do a better job and to make a better effort to make newcomers welcome. It can be very intimidating going into a new club.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joseph","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZ74kJf-aolVRNDtQ_gKBV06FDttNqQ33o2P1k-WbqtKjUHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Last time I went there, I was kicked out for no reason. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Christopher T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLgJ2BhjMXepwQfKmwAoIoEick_VJvwoti7nnCJols-wRSPlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Drove by here several times and see the long line so decided not to…til today, on Sunday bad 15mins before it closed.  We make it in, and we’re the 3rd to last customer.  Cute little shop with 2 sections; one for drinks and one for the bakery.  Great vibe with both inside and outside seatings.  Varies breads options but cute teddy bear designs.  It’s goods and consistency for the quality throughout their baked goods.  Is it great, there’s better places.  Is it bad, no it just good and well make.   You can see inside where they’re making their goodies.  The drinks are quite tasty and not too sweet.  The staff are wonderful, nice, helpful and friendly.  The place is cute decor and clean and bright.  Overall, not bad for the quality and the prices. Parking is okey, street pay or parking structure next door.  But is it worth it for standing in line for it?  Sure why not.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPWbX0Y7gk08RPO2P3Wx3l&fid=0x0:0x2ea1d8b25704d8fe"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Sheri R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzB7HtmCRNqfgAAMdptIdXQ4KKFemFM6BrRO3TXf6_UWyjbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you have never tried a banana creme matcha latte, this is the place!! I came here at the suggestion of a friend, enroute to another appointment. I got lucky with parking in the morning and waited in the line wasn't too bad, it's pretty fast. The display of mouth watering and cute baked treats. I got the banana latte at the recommendation of the cashier, and a wide array of baked goods. The folks at the counter were all helpful. My favorite was the chocolate filled bread. The package is so cute too! They also have some other products you can buy on the shelf if you like their adorable branding.

Something I love about them is that they are so thoughtful in giving customers recommended handling and eating notes. See the picture I posted.

Restroom? Don't remember.

Parking? Yes; it was a bit challenging to find a spot but you ust need to keep driving around to find something.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvSQ0rN7le7WFJvisjlIU8&fid=0x0:0x2ea1d8b25704d8fe"],"When":"2026-3-1"},{"Name":"Alliah Cabradilla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNpSniYqItRtXKOM91RBw5d_OrfAEYP5xA4tan-kw5qJYmnnxKUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely love this cafe, it's so cute and aesthetically pleasing to the eyes.
The pastry were good and I loved their theme was on point for the holidays with their bread design. The matcha with banana cream was also good as well. Staff were nice and friendly and so very attentive! I do want to mention that there is a line when you get there but it moves pretty quick and you might have to ask for the cute box that they have!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKxxNt0zqtfroE2knnob-4&fid=0x0:0x2ea1d8b25704d8fe"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Jessica","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKR1UR6IdWrkub0eUtuTDqgPK8T8IgICzNduA_oZ7KxVYjgXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was amazing! Honestly anything you order will be amazing because it is fresh and not too sweet.

Let me help you out:
- get the kobo-ji cha latte
- get one of the panini sandwiches (if you can’t decide then go for the japanini)
- cookie salt & butter roll- just get a whole box of these- because you’ll want to share and be left with none

You’re welcome!

But seriously everything is so good- go on a rainy day so the line won’t be terribly long and service was great even on a crazy rainy day.

The only the I wish they had was more seating ❤️❤️ cause I like to eat everything fresh! But seriously the drink was so good- the cold brew sea salt matcha was also 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARec_K89LvGHPxoHTaKalP&fid=0x0:0x2ea1d8b25704d8fe"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Vivian Anne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDQ0OHbNj6UQRBzCP69hBoZJ0ZwVpxPgxP0VEHnk7W6XG4kA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We visited Okayama Kobo on a Sunday 1 hour before closing. Although it was busy, the line moved quickly and the bakery case was well stocked and fresh bread was still coming out from the ovens. We ordered a curry pan, chocolate emoji bun (dark chocolate and vanilla cream), banana creme matcha latte, and kobo-jicha latte (hojicha latte). Both of the breads were fresh, warm, and tasty. I really disliked her banana bread matcha latte - the banana foam had an artificial taste to it. However the kobo-jicha latte was good. I would stop by to the other breads, but I wouldn't go out of my way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhGnAPR_lqqvdlkJvXXRGE&fid=0x0:0x2ea1d8b25704d8fe"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Nathalie Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdDZKV3sjD9ZVGxlOUN3jBIRNiL2QAcs17xI7inF7ezTBi3Yc-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Def try to get here early when they open. We arrived around 1030/11a and there was a long line . I think it took about 20 min to order the breads. Once you get to the cashier to pay for your bread, they’ll ask if you want a drink too, which you’ll pay for at the same time. But you’ll have to wait additionally for the drink to be made. I think we waited another 20 min or so for it to be ready.

There’s outdoor seating but not a lot of umbrellas to protect you from sun so we took our food to a nearby seating area that had huge umbrellas.

The breads were so good and soft. They had run out of a few things I wanted to try (plain salt butter roll and curry pan) and I didn’t wanna wait 20+ min for a fresh batch. Next time !

The breads we ordered were : japanini, matcha mochi red bean bun, everything seasoning salt  butter roll, cookie salt butter roll, sunrise,  matcha sunrise, honey croissant and cinnamon roll. Everything very good ! Comes in a cute box too

Their drinks were nothing special. We got the seasonal pumpkin latte and regular matcha latte. I didn’t realize the matcha latte would be sweetened - I think it was some sort of vanilla syrup (it reminded me of vanilla bean ice cream slightly). I couldn’t taste ANY matcha. Bc their drinks weren’t impressive, I would skip the additional ~20 min wait.

Their merch was super cute.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKIH5UOoAR9trjauP6rDpr&fid=0x0:0x2ea1d8b25704d8fe"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Chun Sang Ma (Tom)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWixtBJCc8APKu-CDCjy0MrtzX_KD86e8l86VsI_cg0cOQSOds=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🍞 Popular Restaurant in Anaheim — Okayama Kobo Bakery Café

Absolutely amazing! This place is top-notch when it comes to quality and consistency. No matter what type of bakery you compare it to, Okayama Kobo truly stands out. Their bread and pastries are incredibly fresh, soft, and flavorful. (I say “most” because I haven’t tried everything yet — but from what I’ve had, everything’s been excellent!)

⸻

📍 Location & Parking

Okayama Kobo is located on W Center Street Promenade near S Lemon St, right next to The Barber Shop and Lazy Bird. Just a few doors down, you’ll find Shin-Sen-Gumi. Parking is super convenient — there’s a garage right behind the bakery, plenty of street parking with 90-minute green zones, and several open stalls around the area.

⸻

🥐 What to Try

The shop layout is split into two sides — the right side is where you’ll find all the bread and pastries, while the left side serves drinks. Both sides connect in the middle, making it easy to browse.
Some of my favorites include:
•	🌅 Sunrise & Matcha Sunrise
•	🧈 Salt & Butter Roll
•	🐻 Kobo Kuma
•	🍓 Strawberry Cream Croissant
•	🍛 Curry Pan
And don’t miss their Kobo-Jicha Latte — it’s smooth, fragrant, and pairs perfectly with any pastry!

⸻

😊 Service & Vibes

The staff here are always friendly and super helpful. Despite the long lines (which often stretch a few shops away, especially during weekends or lunchtime), the service stays efficient and polite. The atmosphere feels warm, inviting, and full of that irresistible bakery aroma.

⸻

💬 Final Thoughts

I fell in love with this bakery on my first visit — and since then, I’ve been a regular. Whether you’re here for a quick pastry run, a cozy drink, or to pick up a box of goodies for friends, Okayama Kobo never disappoints.
Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDFAOvMywdfIJEZS09X_WQ&fid=0x0:0x2ea1d8b25704d8fe"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Millena P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVah1vphLTCG2y_FdpJx-3HgrLnHIsO11-urL0k0emkCDiReG1v=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One thing I know about Japanese bakeries, they know how to make light pastries that aren't too over-filling, incredibly delicious tasting, and just enough to satisfy a craving.

Parking: This spot is located in Downtown Anaheim. Good luck finding street parking. Luckily they're located right next to a garage parking structure. Free parking structure!

Ambiance/Environment: I visited on a Saturday afternoon, and they were poppin! There was a long line outside the bakery, but it moved pretty quick. I noticed there were two cashiers. If you're just ordering drinks, you can order from the register to the left. There's usually no line at this register. If you're ordering pastries and drinks, then you'd wait in line to order at the register to the right. The outdoor decor is cute. The have a small, tight space inside. No indoor seating. Quick grab-n-go only.

Service: The workers were quick and efficient. Thank you to one of the workers that complimented my phone case.

Pastries and drinks: In order to get the cute box, you have to get 6 or more pastries. It was tempting to order one of everything. The pastries are displayed behind a glass and labeled with prices. I got the Strawberry Croissant, Kobo Kuma, Cookie Salt & Butter, S'mores Danish, Hot Dog Panini, and Matcha Cream Stick Bun. I also ordered the Matcha Sea Salt Cold Brew. This is a caramel cold brew topped with matcha sea salt foam. They don’t offer straws, so make sure to sip! The foam paired well with the cold brew; it wasn’t too sweet and the matcha flavor came through. The cold brew was surprisingly creamy and slightly sweetened from the caramel. All their pastries are made with Hokkaido flour, additive & preservative free. Their breads are definitely light and not too heavy. Highly recommend their most popular pastry - Kobo Kuma! The vanilla cream isn’t sweet at all. The strawberry croissant was fresh. The hot dog panini tasted as expected; nothing special. The cookie salt & butter was delicious, but not sure what exactly made it “cookie” bc I didn’t taste anything related to cookie lol. The matcha cream stick bun was my second fav. The matcha cream is sooo good! The s’mores danish was probably the sweetest thing out of everything. It had chocolate filling and a torched marshmallow on top.

Pricing: I think their prices are decently average. Perfect for a light dessert or breakfast on-the-go. I really enjoyed their coffee and will be back to try their matcha and other pastries!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8NHVw20n-mmIiTkJ5393w&fid=0x0:0x2ea1d8b25704d8fe"],"When":"2025-11-8"}]

He was able to unlock my car within two minutes. Driver gave Agent false info to make himself look good even stating he did not phone me even when I have his phone number otherwise if he didn't call me how did I have it? Of course Agent didn't side with the customer and I had to cancel the tow not wanting nor trusting this driver and AAA Agent.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kimmia Salgado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW-GEIsZ8-evQBjuWBSYTerb4TFKIg8zkicJZ1pNl3lcxhDfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best AAA experiences! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Makai Genovese","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUa8tGPRcu7EmHeZALwYQHYlUsA6D_y6U9LmvNaK4Puu525Rv4n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I asked in a FB Tiki lounge group what Tiki Bar I should visit and Strong Water was the most recommended. Friendly greetings and when you walk in you’ve stepped into a different world. The ambience and mood is exactly what I hoped for . The drinks were amazing and lots of food options even for those with food allergies. Service is punctual and friendly , they run a tight ship . As with most Tiki bars they are pressed for time which is understandable. Strong water staff is just a couple notches above most places . Not making us feel rushed .As Tiki enthusiasts we’re happy to spend our max time of 2 hours to make space .We’re definitely making this our go to place when we visit OC .

Give yourself time for parking to be sorted out if it’s your first time .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChZwklwWTFAiQa-ALXqwDz&fid=0x0:0x7fd343e6dd924e8"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Steve DeBellis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcU-aDzlGUwYLWd8Dk4PrkpUHAWnXaW-47ePdIC6Gl7E_w3oMmPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've been coming to Strong Water for years and it's easily in our top five of all time. Every detail from the moment you walk in is expertly thought out. Food, drinks, atmosphere, staff, they're things you won't find elsewhere. Good for a boozy brunch, an after work dinner and drinks, or a late night cap.

Currently on a quest to try every drink on the menu and we're almost done! Our highlights are the Buzzin' Jungle Bird, Zombie King, Dead to Port (seasonal), and Naval Grog. Always new seasonal drinks to try out, so never the same experience.

Food menu is always changing with some staples like the crispy lumpia. Always a good meal. Chef Steve can really put a dish together! I miss the pork chop and hamburg steak, bring them back!

We've gotten to know the staff over the years and everyone is always so excellent to us. It really shows that everyone takes care of each other here. So glad this is a spot in our back yard here in Anaheim!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFgaJrOfXGXPn3F9RdPyTr&fid=0x0:0x7fd343e6dd924e8"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Michael Headley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX32WlOnty_qN6XaTVLwQfKGPkgqZWIFE7fSzKBy3eOID6oqh-mBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Strong Water is hands-down one of the best hidden gems in Anaheim. From the moment you step inside, you’re transported into a tropical speakeasy that feels like an adventure all its own. The atmosphere is warm, immersive, and full of detail—every corner tells a story.

The cocktails are simply next-level. Each drink is crafted with creativity and balance, often served with an impressive presentation that matches the tiki vibe perfectly. Whether you’re into rum classics or something bold and new, the bartenders are incredibly knowledgeable and happy to recommend something amazing.

The food is just as impressive—fresh, flavorful, and far beyond what you’d expect from a bar menu. The small plates pair beautifully with the drinks, and the service is friendly, attentive, and genuinely enthusiastic about what they do.

Strong Water isn’t just a bar—it’s an experience. Perfect for date night, catching up with friends, or treating yourself to a unique night out. I can’t wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCuaW-rBGPQkVw7u9IQ1fQT&fid=0x0:0x7fd343e6dd924e8"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Aurora Gintz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXw0pMF4AOzomBQJR5jlLH0OGxhRqaJRXx4B-KhjZT5ljJZisHo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Walking into this tiki bar felt like stepping into a portal where all my responsibilities evaporated and were replaced with pineapples wearing sunglasses. The décor is peak island fantasy — bamboo everywhere, glowing lanterns, and at least three tikis who looked like they were silently judging my life choices (fair).

Now, the drinks. My goodness, the drinks. Each cocktail was so delicious I briefly considered proposing marriage to the bartender. These creations were bright, bold, and strong enough that halfway through my second one, I started seriously believing I could surf… despite the fact that I can’t even balance on a rolling office chair.

Every drink looked like a postcard from a tropical getaway — fresh fruit, swirly straws, tiny umbrellas that I’m 99% sure increased my happiness by at least ten points.

Edgar was hilarious, kind, and super friendly matching the tiki vibe. He guided me through the menu like wise island sages, except with more rum and better jokes.

If you want an evening that tastes like vacation, smells like coconut, and feels like a cheerful ambush by good decisions disguised as bad ones, this is your spot. Five gloriously tipsy stars. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEgLOY9gg1fVC6AUEUIE7u&fid=0x0:0x7fd343e6dd924e8"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"The Breakfast King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxvMXTnC7aJnIUyc1-tEfWmpb-MhLx_GGy387SKkM6E0EJehI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best tiki bar on planet Earth. Maybe I'm biased because The Blind Rabbit is my favorite cocktail bar, but Strong Water is special. The attention to detail and quality in perfection is on full display. Innovation is always my favorite thing here. The drinks and food are top tier, but the service is impeccable. Amazing staff and the best drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrBJ-Vv9zvJLH7Qku82z4r&fid=0x0:0x7fd343e6dd924e8"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Ashton Jury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXiokTaDnXcrd6ncEwSYefGl-hQUSSlv326yCuWlEWowThaIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Strong Water in Anaheim is an absolute gem for anyone who loves a good tiki bar with a twist. This pirate-themed haven has become my go-to spot, and with good reason. Their seasonal menu keeps things fresh and exciting, offering both alcohol-infused and non-alcoholic concoctions that are nothing short of innovative.

Currently, they're celebrating the "Happy Hula Days" for the Christmas season, and the atmosphere is as festive as it gets! The new menu, which debuted on October 1st, continues to impress with its creative offerings. The house burger with Spam is always a great choice, but my personal favorite right now is the Hamachi Crudo—an absolute delight with its fresh, vibrant flavors.

The Thai deviled eggs and tater tots are must-tries. I swear, they’ve never done a tot wrong!

I do wish they’d bring back the gin-cured salmon and that spicy mustard they used on the pork chop tomahawk. Those were truly standout items.

The staff, or should I say "the crew," are consistently fantastic. Iris, our server during our last visit, was phenomenal. Her humor and expert recommendations added an extra layer of enjoyment to the night.

Overall, Strong Water is a delightful escape with its unique theme, delicious food, and outstanding service. Whether you're a regular or a first-timer, this place is sure to impress! 🌺🍹🦜","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsBqiYbr4DUGLQ121ggK3N&fid=0x0:0x7fd343e6dd924e8"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Haxel Stranger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtJRdYipM76S5P17lHcaeFs39Dftfuos4R4Py8vzb9BYi3wnLkTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"IFYKYK type of place! Came from San Jose for some Disney fun but this place is the spot !
Didn’t know what to expect but so glad this was my first stop in Anaheim ! The decor , staff, food, and drinks is the perfect backdrop for a great time ! Try the Loco Moco burger if you wanna melt as you eat it’s so good !
Seasonal Halloween drinks presented in tarot cards for menus is a killer idea! Fried oysters and deviled eggs are so delicious! Hope you get lucky with a reservation!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7Iv8ERPI0UyIgurA_89H_&fid=0x0:0x7fd343e6dd924e8"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Josie Ribeiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvhWqC4zQnVaFxC1j5TWIBG8jI_YpHrnCSQ8y85pKrMnNBxuoX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super nice speakeasy with generous pouring and extremely attentive staff.  The ambiance is very nice.  Josh (server) and Yin (owner) are fantastic hosts.   The drinks are very creative and delicious. If you want something mainstream, you could also get wine.  A great place to get some glassware as keepsakes!

The owner also operates the Rabbit Hole and another location at the packing area.

I super recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_Blr2Ei8V2X5pB2mjj_dz&fid=0x0:0x7fd343e6dd924e8"],"When":"2025-9-4"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Becky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpDkQQwXzH2s1dhHOUd2zz_iHU50U1Q_ruO51ObyBNaDo8dmtXpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"So I went here during the digital circus event. The most I can say is the place looks cute but even for the price I paid not even worth it. it lacks in food/drinks and lacks heavily in their events.
First off it's not a big area you'll have better chances of finding a seat a Dunkin and experience was basically the willy Wonka event where people paid for me nothing just cheesy experience
The drinks were ok I will admit they were good but felt like nothing special it was pretty expensive for a drink and small piece of chocolate that's no bigger than my hand. What was it 3 dollars ? The VIP reward scavenger hunt was a card that just tricks you into buying food and merch just to give you a post card and the staff  telling  you "congratulations you did this and it's rare " which is not because my cousin got the same card at a convention recently
The main room just cut outs of the characters and video playing on mute of the episodes. There hardly any seats like I mentioned before. The tables are very sticky no one cleans them so it was uncomfortable.
The merch shop had hardly anything to sell. There no restocking there nothing really
Honestly I don't even feel the wait line necessary they should of just left the doors open and let people get in line for the  drinks and the only thing I would do is put a wait line for merch shop so no one steals anything. Trust me the "cafe" area doesn't offer much and no one gonna stick around if they do less than 10 mins I'm sure.
If you're gonna have an event at least do something better like karaoke, or fanfic reading, cosplay contest once a day thing. Something or anything to say make it worth the money and time. I don't think I'll be coming back but I do wish this place better and I hope they do better events","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB74PrJ60oCu4L6GVPhpV4K&fid=0x0:0x9ed80d1dcb329f23"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Kristin Jung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbwxBO9tU6l4EkU0d0OPYa292KOzX7_ZPuOpFGF70zWgxFK22n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was beautiful inside! I was accompanying friends to an Ironmouse Pop-up and had no idea what I was walking into. I was completely-pleasantly shocked.
I ordered the Anarchy Latte and the Flancitos. Both were great! I ordered the latte with Oat Milk for a $1.00 upcharge (lame). The flan was great, very dense and the sauce was so sweet.
The latte did not look like what was advertised on the social media page
page.
The decor was GORGEOUS!! It felt so magical inside. They had a shelf with books for you to read while there, a table full of boardgames and card games.
There was a side room where people were playing DnD and there was a bunch of merch you could buy.
We parked on a side street across from the huge church. The bathrooms were a surprise!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCo1r3XpEuSUprAFYSMk8SQ&fid=0x0:0x9ed80d1dcb329f23"],"When":"2026-2-6"},{"Name":"Delmy Santos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyFAKQPHroB7-GVombW_eDIJMsC69Xvqsv4hyRsUnTTGOkzU0Ydg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went for the Over the Garden Wall event and it was beautifully decorated! The food and drinks fit the event so well and were delicious. They also had merch stands on the other side of the cafe where I bought some really nice cardigans and sweaters. They also had an area for board games and free play. We easily spent 2 hours here. The staff were so friendly and we has such a great time! Thank you SOOO much, will be coming again :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBATWVoBFBcxR9-uq3BXVLW&fid=0x0:0x9ed80d1dcb329f23"],"When":"2025-11-3"},{"Name":"Collette Richey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz1l5ICWI_Ajj-nr7-YDKBbpU9gT7pPkXG8JBsfM1kyPELHcul=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place was pretty cool, went for the digital circus pop-up. The atmosphere was super awesome, loved the whimsical vibes and giant DnD chair and table. When we got there a lot of the food items were gone besides a few treats. My first drink, the zooble parts, tasted like water, however it was awesome that the staff exchanged the drink for me for the Funny One which was the Jax taro drink. That was SOOO good, I loved it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAyYXwgmnGuA1b-f_wURsdh&fid=0x0:0x9ed80d1dcb329f23"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Tonya Kubo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzVV1_rL4E0Hnt7qjGznkMPZ0nJRnk5apaCpiHGfwqsS0MGZ84Lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My daughter wanted to check out this place after hearing about it from a friend. It wasn't quite what I expected but she was thrilled. The fantasy-themed decor makes it feel like an escape. The coffee drinks are on the sweeter side, which is not my favorite but our girls were thrilled.
Seems like we were there the day after a big event because they were sold out of several food items but we are glad we went.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3Gg_-mmAgSi1ocB-FJ2HA&fid=0x0:0x9ed80d1dcb329f23"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"JcherraX","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMXe1-5dFQCXvvMORxi0vgWjPzS4oe3NNWc4rRAz72iUHxbFqs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved it it was nice to just try something different food was suprisingly good simple yet good atmosphere amazing specially the girl outside and all the staff are great its pretty cool inside vwry packed just know that the only downside is alot of waiting so if you can rsvp tjat would be better because walk ins will have to wait a while lol luckily me and my bros amd sis got rsvp otherwise its great to spend 1 hour and check out items and eat and drink they have the digital circus event so maybe thats why it was super packed some people came in dressed up in that theme it was awesome again had a great time. 🙂👌 we got lucky with the 5 seat table but again tjat was luck lol i wonder what the next theme will be 🤔","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdOFpHylqC9ExEkNgHlyur&fid=0x0:0x9ed80d1dcb329f23"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Jay J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaAejNIroTjh4NoKObxGdrB1ZxnhBu4K5FNuF_KvI9AyBO9wsXgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I always love coming here for events! The staff is very accommodating. The food and drinks are very average and don't fit the pictures. Overall a great place to hang out and buy merch and do activities!
The pictures show me at their recent Over the Garden Wall event.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCD-C6MZ2Kh0wUU8wSoo6-K&fid=0x0:0x9ed80d1dcb329f23"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Miranda Amezquita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKevuQ8tO0VO3aJ-uks4OrbSvsMw7gndtaGSX_kOgMyJiu38w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"THE PLACE IS EMPTY AND WERE WAITING OUTSIDE IN THE HOT SUN! They need to have a virtual waitlist system so fans and customers aren’t waiting outside in the hot sun. We get that their busy, their not really busy because there’s A TOTAL OF 5 PEOPLE INSIDE. This is so disorganized and disappointing.

Update: In response to the owner calling the place “packed” here are some photos from inside when I went to the bathroom. Not packed and SEVERAL open seats and tables.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4_5pYRNdWQ_mIjpOp9lQX&fid=0x0:0x9ed80d1dcb329f23"],"When":"2025-12-24"}]

OC come by!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lissa Newton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqST6NMnCyEwGmaxdpca-YYkZ6k5j8SadCxkqEtLsd4sQP6qsxkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Definitely cute, unusual and fantasy themed, you feel like you've walked into a segment of a dream that you can not only see but smell. The air seems punctuated with sweetness, and the drinks are very sweet and not customizable in this department. They serve a small amount of food, the waffles being some of the favorites (pictured here without the toppings). This place can become busy quickly, so plan to wait or arrive early. The treehouse is rentable for a fee, and although they cannot restrict people from coming into the area, they do block off the section and make people vacate when it's rented.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICpjPHfeA&fid=0x0:0x9e2c069ad80b0cee"],"When":"2023-7-29"},{"Name":"THE HAMMER","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWg7ZTWtT99r_bW_k8gKJ6mqUSOCVViA5AAFQwEVlv2u0LdQobmWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So amazing!!!
#requiemcafe
#glitch_prod","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAocelg3R4rj3qo9q8PHqHx&fid=0x0:0x9e2c069ad80b0cee"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Jason Camorlinga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0Oae3piy-lqoWUgiDeECVCpw8rHrWQRWAu1GZTcI4b-KCkTur=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Venturing into Requiem's mystical Item Shop was like stumbling upon a treasure trove for adventurers. The shelves adorned with plush toys of legendary creatures, from fire-breathing dragons to mischievous imps, invoked a sense of whimsy and nostalgia. Board games, a collection fit for a wizard's library, lined the walls—each box a portal to realms of strategy and camaraderie.

For those eager to embark on an instant quest, the option to purchase plush companions was a charming addition. However, the true gem lay in the selection of board games available for purchase or rent. The tables, adorned with intricate maps, invited patrons to embark on epic journeys, while the shelves stocked with board games for sale ensured that the magic could continue at home. Requiem's Item Shop is more than a retail space; it's a gateway to shared adventures, where plush creatures and board games unite to create an enchanting experience for all who dare to enter.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLizZykVLOR3oBAaEH7jGtew-QK9kB8z_Gugg8Z4ebAAKQKLw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They lied to us about their items now they make it exclusively to their event waited in line for that item I will return everything and I expect my money right away","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Mera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUVj6qoFWe0KJf2iMTxMw1Wo50VLj6LMk1gdrVHLejTmnQne4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unorganized and unprofessional","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Colin Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKrZ9MacfpSgvJyPnUnGhrdTZQ8ApH2RECgVAq6n_WlS6kB2w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Imtiaz Hasan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8MrzQWnXRdMArUK4wXIS0aC2DqLk2m2FHvxHOQr5UEbcSsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Second location of Craft S&F I tried. I loved the location and ambiance of this location. Service was excellent and the food is amazing as always. A great place for halal bbq. All halal meat menu - beef and chicken. Mostly I am not able to find good bbq beef ribs here in California, but this location had it and it was really good. I will go there again for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOgrHr1wKs4pBJpZBoQ5BD&fid=0x0:0x915cfd0e2db90f0d"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"J G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKLiPDFhERwD7-Xll8gR0VSg22fl7xR1ovu1F5A0I3v6ScNxfI-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s was a good experience overall, inside and outside seating available and it looks like they a full bar (I could be wrong).

Street parking available!

We were a party of four, on a Sunday (Labor Day weekend) around 5 pm. The restaurant was pretty empty, maybe five tables or so were being occupied.

The place is clean, good atmosphere, lots of TVs around to enjoy some sports, and well organized. The men’s bathroom long as clean though. The urinal stalls seemed to be clogged.

The place was really hot inside, no A/C, but once they opened up the big doors leading to the outside seating, then we felt the nice breeze coming through.

The food was really good. We decided to get the big meal (4-6 people) and share it between us four. It was enough food. Flavorful short ribs, tasty grilled chicken, and nicely cooked brisket.

Definitely worth the visit if you around the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDl7NcJYHSNU8mvryHHVW9K&fid=0x0:0x915cfd0e2db90f0d"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Earvin Montero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmmhQqfyOHUhxAggE7EUYxqnnFAF8LZmurpmwyOtgf-Q6evnjbnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Craft by Smoke and Fire is a great restaurant. The atmosphere feels warm and friendly, the food is delicious, and the service is excellent. We enjoyed delicious, juicy, and flavorful ribs and brisket, and the sides were great as well. Overall, it’s a fantastic option in the area, you’ll probably want to go more than once!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDK-0gMKxUJBOOdL0q3nbh6&fid=0x0:0x915cfd0e2db90f0d"],"When":"2025-11-3"},{"Name":"mohammed el-assaad (bigmoe)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOIT0Lcbf3sGgGjaAhUTS3AuIin83AvpCLbR72eYlsDJTNibs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Genuinely the best American Texas BBQ ever!
I came all the way from Montreal to try Craft by Smoke and Fire, and it absolutely lived up to the hype. From the moment I walked in, the experience was incredible. The staff is super friendly, welcoming, and you can feel the passion they put into everything. And honestly — the general manager is the GOAT. His energy and hospitality take the whole place to another level.

The BBQ itself is unreal. This is genuinely the best American Texas-style BBQ I’ve ever had. The meat is tender, smoky, juicy, and full of deep, authentic flavor. Every bite hits perfectly.

If you’re into BBQ, this place is an absolute MUST. Amazing people, unbelievable food, and an experience worth traveling for. Highly, highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCTWNYHs9n3KOsa2-kKEAM&fid=0x0:0x915cfd0e2db90f0d"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Mohammed Hussain (Moe)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0JpejFbIa-TXHtNe8HrKwX84tHQR-PdxGg20uMwjgURKx4JO-Yg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic Halal BBQ Spot!
I was visiting from the Bay Area and stopped in for lunch—absolutely worth it. The steaks were cooked to perfection, and the ribs were incredibly tender, falling right off the bone. A must-visit if you’re looking for quality halal BBQ!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAaWThoGu4oCMhtjt3Yw-Hx&fid=0x0:0x915cfd0e2db90f0d"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Matt Swanson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZBF5YlCN_mPQCIzsuYA3HQamVlb77RgjYEtwtxJyAWJlU5wk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Stopped here for takeout on vacation and it is even more overpriced than Disneyland. After tip one order of birria tacos was $24 and they were three of the smallest tacos I have ever had and at $8 a piece I was extremely disappointed.. if they’re going to be that small I would at least hope they’d be filled with a good amount of meat but they were extremely stingy with the meat as well. Extremely disappointing meal from this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBA_62nuJoWN4C3JOG4R_7m&fid=0x0:0x915cfd0e2db90f0d"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Rogelio Jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlwgZxxovBpi92-xz3JwYZN92slDZ9yGxM9vMzn2TNveM99g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is delicious,  just like the name states Craft by Smoke and Fire, it truly is. Wow so well crafted,  so i like beef and I do like brisket but to be honest it not always on top of my list. Now that I said that,  wow this well crafted brisket it delicious it has changed my mine about brisket.  It just juice,  tender, savory and explosive to my taste buds. I have there jalapeños burger,  mac n cheese,  loaded potato and brisket waffle fries.. my sisters and brothers this is a must spot to visit if your in the area. They also take reservations.  Feed your food souls and God bless","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKfyk9vDnb_ybw&fid=0x0:0x915cfd0e2db90f0d"],"When":"2025-5-17"},{"Name":"Perla Bell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULua9nO6O41hBR3D_L3TB2j8apzYuabyPl1avGFJVSQ0qyh5A8MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A hiding gem. Great service, food and drinks.
We really enjoyed the atmosphere and to our surprise we found out they have a speakeasy bar on the back.  Fun experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUSIEu8SMwTBKcaVYiu4NN&fid=0x0:0x915cfd0e2db90f0d"],"When":"2025-11-5"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Tracy Hall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhS1DAG2afyQsR70TjsBfL5R5zK3ED7T7L25KuAV7nYTo1gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Celebrated my birthday with friends at this great little place in Anaheim! They only have small bites, but everything was delicious. The staff was very friendly, helpful and attentive. The three of us all got a different type of wine and we're all very pleased. Love supporting small businesses like this, who seem to truly care about their customers! 💙","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDqnPCooAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5abee3e108df024e"],"When":"2021-7-1"},{"Name":"Bayani Hilo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVumXVJ9-hl9jzhwGaRJzM70aOalq1Z-B8SZSN_G88peqxgSsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This has become my favorite place to relax. The wine flight is really good. They have a very good selection of beer. And their food is so delicious. They have food pairings for pretty much all of their wines and beers. On the weekends they have someone playing live music and it fits just right with the romantic atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4wrK3XA\u0026fid=0x0:0x5abee3e108df024e"],"When":"2017-2-15"},{"Name":"Khris Ward","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZxPJsDcZARHhbf4pie8h79nO86aAidcq585HxRONIuw55hQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible local wine bar. Very friendly staff. The steak frites were delicious.  Wines by the glass (and half glass) showcased a lot of the central coast and Paso Robles.  Wonderful experience overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELSRm6ybjM3W3wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5abee3e108df024e"],"When":"2025-5-28"},{"Name":"Iggy Rosenberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPCWANDz9SXrLslfvMVlsWxAtuyywjm6HQzaTxr2kqO9z0HZZk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely wine bar with great selections, a super friendly staff, and very accommodating kitchen","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Micah Ranney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQTYgQ-4fsX6NZOQpRL3sj5GyArHNOUnSPKK_tWj75mtIZLYF2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You can't go wrong. Everything here is great. Great wine, great food, great staff. I've been going here for nearly ten years and I've thoroughly enjoyed every visit. They have a great selection of wines and a few food items for service. Their charcuterie plates are a must! I also love the salt and pepper pistachios.\nThey have a small match section with bottles they serve and a curated selection of gourmet food items like crackers, chocolates and jams. I haven't had an item I didn't love. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"emily varela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSGS1l2H3H2n9nFHNDpbavTcXte8RgFUogq9DpWAyTGbsOPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I held my bridal shower here and I don’t have enough nice worlds. Sonya was awesome through out the whole process of booking  and was so helpful on the day of. I came to visit before hosting my event and everything the spectacular then as well. I couldn’t recommend this place enough.\nThank you Sonya for a wonderful day!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruben Polino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuSnn37CBeYhhyxH6HeYiAlpOadX0t713ZcOhC6Vlcdp_ihQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was my first time at this location and I love it. The employees there are really friendly. The atmosphere is perfect to get you in the mood to enjoy a lovely wine of your choice. I would definitely come back to enjoy a glass of wine. My fiancé and I order the humus for appetizer and it is delicious. I would recommend this for the people with a taste in spices since is has a little kick.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenn J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvEhRCUgR1DQBLYFPv6tnxcMvGdBYFssToX3aBOOysuXhp9S4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this local wine bar. It is my favorite. The owners, Mike and Sonja, are great people and the staff are always welcoming. They have a perfect outdoor patio, tasty wine flights, cold beer and yummy small bites and charcuterie to accompany the beverage of your choice. Sonja can answer your wine questions and guide you to the perfect wine to enjoy. Mike is also a killer guitarist and entertains some nights. Just a nice local place to meet with friends…","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lisa Sartor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVX8AC4x7Iu8cfsi3E-FhYCxbjsqMQ8_BYIdJ-_NgN00grHITok=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have been on the waiting list for 15 years and have twice illegally lost vouchers. Once in 2017 when 350 families were promised vouchers and then told that Anaheim was out of money. The truth is ( I can show you the documentation proving this)  the top p
management officials due to a "secreterial oversite" lined their pockets with the money. Second time ( I am fully disabled with a son who was also qualified as disabled due to a heart and autoimmune condition that almost took his life) I was going to rent my mom's condo as she retired and moved.  This was my childhood home and my son was raised here. He have no local family so our whole support network was there. Against their very own policy of allowing disabled families to rent from relatives, I was denied this opportunity.  Kerrin Cardwell  who pretended to be tbe main authority of AHA told my mother ( unethically on a phone call to not help me as poor people always figure it out!) And denied the rental and claimed my child who just had heart surgery and had active pneumonia an autoimmune condition and severe thelosemia as provided by labs and doctors according to labs and a doctors reasonable accommodation letter stating to not move my son from his childhood home. She denied our legal right to rent from a relative. Im going to say I believe that there is absolute discrimination going on and I have lived on the streets on and off as a disabled mother who now has 3 college graduates as my children are grown up. Im now considered elderly and still am getting unethicly messed with my the AHA. God forgive you all for the hell you have put my children and I through!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tito Bombaci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCTXzoPBBxd03IAYoFw1C-LU1n5JzGPPug7OMlTz6wm985e1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Remarkably fluid for the forward-facing office of a public agency; which I suspect is largely due to the excellent routing skills of a particular first-rate receptionist on board today. 👌","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yeordana Espinoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXI-MFJcJar3xnj_oK3sq-iIpmI3iyRhqcKYYozvuhcMoo0Fxsb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It doesn't deserve a single star.  I have waited for more than 5 years, and finally last year they started asking me for documentation.  Even though they don't give you much help to bring the documentation, because they ask for so much information and the agencies don't give you this information the next day, some take up to 10 business days, even though I sent everything on time, they sent me a letter in December that he had not sent the information on time.  I sent everything by certified mail, and filed a report with USPS, and they assure that they did receive the documentation, they asked me for documentation again in December, and in less than 9 business days they want everything, they don't care that they are holidays, and Make it harder to get everything, but still get everything done on time.  And I had the feeling that they wanted to deny me, because they want it, when I received a letter telling me not to bring the complete documentation on time, which is a total lie, and that I have 10 business days to appeal, but if I appeal I must Wait 6 months for them to review it, and if you do, apply again.  I tried to communicate with the person in charge of my case, and her supervisor, but it is almost impossible to talk to anyone, it seems like they don't want you to get section 8, not even a bit of patience.  Super bad service.

Update 12/23/2024
Just to update my case, the person who was on my case was Susana, I contacted her in June because no one had contacted me, and they told me they were behind so I had to wait, in December I received the resolution and they took me out of the program, according to them they say that I did not send all the information they requested, when this was a lie, I sent everything they sent me and updated up to the month they requested it again, Susana does not specify what she is requesting, and I only sent the information that is on the list. I carefully read what they say I was missing, and I submitted all this information, if they say that I am not there it is a lie, and unfortunately nothing can be done now.  It's a shame that they don't do their job of checking all the documentation in detail, because that's what they ask for, and what a shame that Susana doesn't specify according to what she needed because I sent her everything on the list. How do you think that if I waited 5 years for this opportunity I was going to let it pass, not all the time involved in gathering the information, begging for the information to be given to me from different agencies because they didn't want to give it to me before the time that they regularly handle, all this effort for nothing. The worst thing is that I found out that there are unscrupulous people in the program who sell your spot to another person and that's why they take you out of the program, someone who found out about this told me this.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arleen Cline","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxF_Wr3cAO4j5uyyXqjgVCJa8ZfM5QQ062QK7tdchhzW1mDcbl3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Working with Adolfo for only a few days and he always answers the phone, very quick and responsive to call and emails. Keeps his word. Does his job. I look forward in continuing the process with Adolfo A.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clem Intone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQK1TqV4fIQrj0WH1jt6ynmwbZzzpfJoJds3tkmy9GFUouplKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible experience. None of them help you and we have been trying to contact our social worker about the voucher after our 30 days notice and she never even responded, causing us to waste more time and almost lose our place. Horrible costumer service and they don’t even let you make calls without an automated voice message. They discriminate against people who arent Hispanic like they did for my family. They are very unprofessional and incompetent of even doing their jobs, especially our social worker.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mariane Nicholson (GOOSE)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKeNAug3V2oSmo9XILsJAc36yIjOdZJDPFQGhQmNM32DvQJ6P_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am forever grateful for Anaheim Housing Authority. I went from being homeless to getting my section 8 voucher in 4 years. Adolfo is a great housing specialist! He quickly responds to my emails or phone calls and calls me back if I leave a message. He also processes all my paperwork in a timely manner and answers any and all questions I may have about my case. I only wish that there was some type of help or assistance for first months rent or security deposit for those like myself who need to move from a 1 to 2 bedroom.  Having no credit makes the security deposit really expensive and even with mine and my husband's combined income were still struggling to come up with $4350 deposit and that's not including first months rent.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sam Higier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKf-UxMplPXEAT1pxLjcY3LlJzTDW0GvlAELfbN90fpJAm41g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monique L. is the best case worker on earth! She helped my family find a stable place to call home & made the process a lot easier. Thanks again Monique keep up the good work! We appreciate you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nadine Berry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgfmfb1o0aJaQ9Knu-BzHAQsnpba0DLOEScw99hBK1S_aPvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":""I have been on the waiting list since 2017 to no avail!!. I am now 74 years old & still nothing. I have called gone into their office & wrote at least 10 letters. I had won the lottery along time ago & they told me that they mailed me a package. I NEVER EVER received it!!. Why wouldn't l respond when l am still waiting?. Lies after lies. I even have certified return receipt but never got the return receipt returned. I also left one at the front desk!!. I will get my congressman involved again. Anaheim Housing l hope that some of your top employees are retired now. There is no excuse for not responding to me. I will come into your office again on Monday 3-31-25 to get some answers".","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Wandering Soul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgxkEntgByC5LiTDlGH32MWwHSKAXyvBQ4GJ8QSCmFKQdDBb1z=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AccessCal has the most beautiful office, kind and respectful staff, and a safe environment. Everyone is extremely helpful. I was nervous to ask for help with my electricity bill, but the process was very quick and took less than 10 minutes. Filling out the intake form was the longest part, and even that was extremely easy to do. I highly recommend AccessCal to anyone in need of supportive services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abdul Qadeer (Shakib)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTt9cingZyVhpwO67BvlRD2p77AF5AlupKncchDuaJ1-0_aVXE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a student of Access California Services, I want to express my deep gratitude and appreciations to my supportive teachers, Mrs. Uyn Joo Namkung, and Mrs. Alia Alabed, and all kind/helpful personnel of Access California Services. I would like to say thank you Mrs. Alizabeth Serrano for all her support in My MediCal approval process.
To be honest, being a student in Access California Services brought me a great change/progress in English Language (writing, lessening and reading), daily communications within community, resume writing, Typing and all. And, I appreciate the helpful advice from my teachers (Mrs. Uyn Joo Namkung and Mrs. Alia Alabed).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kenny A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxi4DWdk1_RHv2VggGAXdRvqNEOdq8qFwrn0gaH8aFoBhwTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beginning from the lady at the front desk, my overall experience at AccessCal was positive. She was friendly and professional while checking us in. Afterwards, she then referred my wife and I to Rania Humidan.

Everything from here went even more amazing.
Ms. Rania Humidan is a true asset to their team! Before meeting Rania and Access California Services, my wife and I had tried to file an I-130 and adjustment of status but it was straight-up rejected by USCIS and we couldn't figure out why no matter how hard we tried. Upon our first meeting with Rania at Access Cal Services, she figured out what the problems were in a few minutes!

She is truly professional, very experienced and an expert with immigration related matters. She helped us correctly fill out the applications and answered all our questions. She gladly set up follow up meetings when necessary, replied emails and to cut the long story short - today I have my green card! My wife and I are forever grateful for Rania Humidan's expertise, kindness, and patience! She is an amazing human and on top of all her good qualities, you can see she also has the fear of God.

Access California is here to support families and make a difference in society. Please keep up the good work. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"alexsandra easter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzzIotJqQV9MQM5iNsU8CpoFdlI0Wwxt_wQ7r5QqPzZQWlcif7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dima Nadia has went above and beyond to help me secure housing and literally saved my life. I am so grateful for this new beginning and she actually cares and is such a pleasure to work with! Thank you Dima! 🥰🥰","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"N Mamontova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzcfEcpUzfVr-68EkTWHfTapK_3YlWIEo8M2CGWoLoAXcoWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you, Access California, for the incredible support and help. I am especially grateful to Dima and Nadya — they acted quickly and helped me secure housing, which truly prevented us from being left without a place to stay.
Thank you so much for everything.
P.S. If you ever find yourself in a difficult situation, don’t hesitate to reach out to the Access California for help.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"megan grant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU94BgWt-ZGAX73JJnyGZoEetmPg4ortuf33YyPa1IUMHJvRrsi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Deema and her team are truly angels.They’re deeply committed to making a real difference and creating what feels like miracles for families going through tough times or are limited.

From my very first call, Deema made me feel seen, valued, and prioritized. Her compassion and professionalism stood out imediately. She cared about my family’s situation and went above and beyond to assist.

Deema and her team treat everyone with kindness, its a no judgement zone. They make you feel welcomed and provide support through the whole proccess. Their hard work and dedication truly change lives. Im beyond grateful for everything they’ve done for me and my family. Thank you from the bottom of my heart!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXK1dNMu0QMoOYui_M4I7nfGWPcWh2anMsklNtkTql1FGlEL68=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would like to express my sincere gratitude to the organization for their timely and meaningful support in covering my rent and deposit. Special thanks to the case managers, Dima and Olena, for their responsiveness, professionalism, and truly exceptional efficiency.
It's hard to believe, but within just 4!!! days, all the necessary documents were prepared, the check was issued, and everything was handled seamlessly. Thanks to this support, my son and I were able to move into a new place with much better living conditions.
Thank you for being there when we needed it most — your help made a real difference in our lives.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amine Boulil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8zYSHSpiNyadoNLsLvqWc6yDAuqz1IqUf1cOTD3VD6oy3IQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing Help and Support!
Rania at Access California Services was extremely helpful with my green card application. She guided me through every step, answered all my questions with patience, and made the process so much easier. Her professionalism, kindness, and attention to detail really stood out. I’m very grateful for her support and highly recommend her and Access California Services to anyone needing immigration assistance. Thank you, Rania!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Michael Montoya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQUux_DI9G98PylspgUINpzORXeCkaC8gXWS0NxhgotmXe9RSleQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best customer service call I centers I have dealt with! Went on\" vacation in the beginning of 2023 to Disney Aulani in Hawaii. They helped me book my vacation from idea phase, to getting to the airport, to fruition. Expertise with customer service!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica Guevara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYHR4KrOnZDUyIyx6SrkVdl-rmraIL3m8M2uimtJQP2HDoCJxp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"So my experience was due to winning a radio contest. Although I wasn’t a paying customer, I should have been treated the same way. I could have been a paying customer depending on the level of service I received. I won airfare, hotel and tickets to Disneyland . We forfeited the airfare and decided to bring our kids , which the representative (Vikki) basically begged me not to bring my kids, very unprofessional. We got our ticket confirmation a week before our travel date. I followed up with them about my hotel on a Friday the week before via email and was told someone else was making my hotel reservations which I had no contact information for. I reached out again on Monday via phone call and was reassured that I would be provided a confirmation number closer to my trip which was in 5 days at that point. I never heard from this company or anyone. I had to reach out to the radio station to get the information. They had told the radio station that they sent me an itinerary which they never did.  Vikki was very difficult to work with the whole time and not very magical.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnItNyzH01roHgK8_qWCFXaMuOW1wC5u9cNT207YcSVAtf1Rus1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Charged us for two extra days, we were unable to use them because we didn't notice till the night of our first day in the parks. Be careful, they will add on days without your consent. We were very clear of how long we needed in the parks.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ken C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVW1qnnFau73JFWkETD_4w_xeNkjG8a7T8iC4xuQCYMQ7KKj8ndww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst experience with a travel.company.  I booked with them for convenience and ease and found it anything but that.  Most of my vacation was spent fixing what they messed up or paying for something I already paid for but needed to buy again because they messed it up.  I had booked travel, hotel and tickets through WDTC and when I got there I learned I had to change my 2 day ticket to a 4 day ticket by calling up.  Not a problem I called and explained I wanted tickets for 4 days because we wanted to head to the park that day.  Our travel agent said no problem but since our tickets had been printed she needed to call.  She called someone up I spoke to him (Abraham) and let him know what we told her.  He seemed really helpful even told us we could go in that day pre-register and get our keys.  We went to the hotel no tickets until Sunday.  I explained t\nwe were told differently and she called the agent up who said we couldnt get our 4 day tickets until Sunday.  I explained that we were leaving Weds morning on a flight booked by Disney so why would I want a 4 day ticket I couldnt use and we werent told that.  My only option was to spend another $585 for new tickets and hope we could get a refund for the original $639. Im also told we cant pre-register that was also untrue but we could on Sunday.  So I show up Sunday and im told no we cant do that.  I walk over to a friend who is also trying to pre-register and magically she can.  So Nate who is helping her pre-registers me, no problem.  I show up Monday morning to drop bags and head to the park and guess what I need to do, everything all over again ie sign papers, put in credit card, give info.  I will never use WDTC again and I will probably stay outside the park from now on especially if I cant get my refunds for my cancelled flight, lost reservation, double charge for tickets and mis-information.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa Chavez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmZjN9hrELIH5oz6jbIVrLdocNBFMf1zZdN9QVwO0p3owXdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very disappointing my first experience with this travel company. I made reservations for 3 nights and they booked me for 2 nights only I ended up paying $1,400 1 adult 2 children 3 parks 3 days. But messed up my hole vacation experience. When I looked into their website pictures of the hotel I was staying they were very nice. But when I got to the hotel I found out it wasn't even a hotel it was a motel, and infested with cockroaches. First and last time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allie Wier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYi6jcT2tYquGiJwOdbkCD1eR1GE_uyfqTrH2_ki14A6uKizcNpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I spent over 2000$ on a vacation through this travel company,  they lied about the hotel and how the deposit fees worked. They tried to fix it by giving us food vouchers for the parks,  but the treatment from the hotel as me livid.  I've called 3 times to complain to the travel company and I'm more and more displeased on this supposed to be magical vacation.  Don't goto Disneyland it is not worth it. If you do stay at a motel 6. Don't trust the travel agency .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isis Dong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3IB58N6i3qg_cRLQeko7lrzj2hrIEp2hb49r2_I3pg2yv17M7Nw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t usually write reviews but WDTC has made me livid and ruined my first ever Disneyland trip. After deciding to travel all the way to the USA from Australia so we could go to Disneyland, we looked up the best options for booking everything as we wanted the trip to go as smoothly as possible while also trying to save money since it is extremely expensive. We found WDTC and saw some good reviews and decided to book with them. We purchased a package with them and it was a great deal and price so once it was completed we left it at that and were so excited to go. When the time came to go to the USA, we contacted them and double checked that everything was fully paid, organised and ready for our arrival and was told that everything was ready and paid for. Once we arrived at the resort, we went to collect our tickets to go to Disneyland and they stated we haven’t paid in full and that we would have to purchase tickets for the next two days but our package would activate on the 3rd day. So we forked out $510 USD (~$750 AUD) for 2 tickets max passes for the park. Then on the 3rd day we received a message to collect our package from the reception and when we checked the contents of what they gave us it had no tickets in them. According to WDTC they cancelled our package altogether not just for the 2 days and we ended up having to pay for another 2 days ($510 USD) which came out to be much more expensive than the package or even a larger ticket. I found this miscommunication and lack of help extremely upsetting as I felt it ruined out disneyland trip and I wasted so much money. This was probably my only chance to ever go to Disneyland so I was really upset at how this even happened when it was all organised and double checked  prior to us coming. Really disappointed with WDTC.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Meri Ellen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBw-UWNvmu-NJ7CypdUv79eEqTLWl6av8obj1XErjmyFjnEu1J=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I enjoyed the opportunity I was given. A wonderful tour of the facility. The whole staff were very welcoming, cheerful,  and warm. You can definitely feel the sense of family and camaraderie and of course the magical Disney feeling. Thank you WDTC","Images":null,"When":""}]

The line to get out was long because no one had prepaid. What is someone without a smartphone or service meant to do? And why would I park here if getting out will always be a nightmare waiting for everyone else's sluggish phone service to make the convoluted payment system work at the exit? Paper tickets are much simpler.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Octavius Rex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxU-YhoXZpr5UiIKUcHf9uShC6rbMhX3Gkv9WnFKXHWrclHe8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"NO STORES VALIDATE THIS STRUCTURE BC THE QR SYSTEM. Forgot to ask this person which parking structure gave them a paper parking ticket for validation. Gate opened only on west side. Only pay via QR codes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jom Don","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbd614VUBeUGI79njo8MKXe5fKIxrRo4FywdP7jndROcs-Tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"$12 for 2 hours 10 minutes parking.  One of the entrances was closed so it was only one way in and one way out as well","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carolyn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1KKf6Yqz-yVaRdQltvZKrmhMb8Ap76sTaqxjOw5WpntI-Tg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I'm pretty frustrated by this!  I've been here before, and this parking structure used to be just open and free - no tickets.  I came now, and there was a ticket system.  I grabbed a ticket, went to a kid's hockey game at the Rinks, and then I had to leave in a hurry.  We left, and they charged us money.  I came back later and parked somewhere else near there and asked the Rinks if they validated.  They said yes, so I called this parking company to see if they could refund me the money since I was clearly there for the hockey game (it was a Sunday), and he said no, he couldn't.  He said once it's done, it's done.  Validation has to be done beforehand.  I understand that, but I feel like they could have offered better customer service and done it since they shouldn't have been paid in the first place.  I called back to see why they couldn't refund it, and he explained that that's just their policy.  He said this parking thing changed ownership to them a couple years ago, so I was right on the fact that it used to be free.  I just don't understand why any other company can refund or credit back, but they can't.  And when I asked, he just kept saying it's their policy. So, it's possible, he could have, but he just didn't want to!  I'm pretty frustrated by their customer service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"severin murphy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEaxOybMrfhW9ljDPKiHS2HJhk-9JX0CACfF_gmMk0DMh4dU_kcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"There is security here which is employed by the City. They're not responsible to watch the cars or anything, but they're there.

There is also security here employed by Disney, but they stay across the street by the apartments where the Disney cast members live, so they're not responsible to watch the cars either.

Across the street is a guard who watches that office full of cubicles. Wells Fargo has a guard who just opens the door for people. Just up on Harbor there are cops. None of these people are responsible for watching the cars.

This seems weird to me.

I know it is all about money, liability and litigation and what-have-you.. but remember when people were actually responsible for stuff? What ever happened to that?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marlon Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXv63rHR4tA4n9sn0l0qTEQJcnUFwBdADdnFfeFXW_xpu13A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"worst parking lot experience. paid $15 before we hopped in our car to depart. took more than 45 mins to leave the garage on a saturday night. ended up paying $20! avoid this garage at all cost!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stefan Trey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhiYR7agb5UpLdKoC5H5K1hN47WSZvDcfzZEwnnKJMp8fM-dU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m more than satisfied. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"D Gio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdXsYziqwfIgJjwYpQGbJNm0uBpKzFOdFCIC-w85mF_81BCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is AMAZING!! Sophie and her team are miracle workers I swear. I was in such a predicament and needed help badly. I needed 20 t shirts with front left breast logo and full back logo and initially went with a different company that promised to get me the shirts by Saturday morning for my event later that night. Well Saturday morning rolls around and instead of my order being delivered I got an email from the company apologizing and explaining the shirts would not be done in time. I scrambled to find someone who could do it and called so many places but no one could help on a Saturday morning at 11am to have my shirts custom made ready to go by 4:30 pm...until I found T-Shirts Outlet.

They were right down the street from my event so I reached out and Sophie was amazing from the start. She immediately asked all the right questions and confirmed my order within a half hour. I was able to Zelle the payment (so no credit card fees either!) And by noon she starred my order. By 4:30 almost on the dot she sent me pics of my shirts and said they were done.

On such a hectic day she showed true compassion and helped make the impossible possible.  And even though it was an extremely rushed order her process was still $100 cheaper than any other company I spoke with. If you need any custom work done don't hesitate to call! These ppl are amazing and saved the day for me. I can't thank her enough!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_3GXlkbNc_0Ccpn6LMVg1&fid=0x0:0x6858b29952cd1a91"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Xenia Monroe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkuhzqDgxLEumHYRWqasq6RHd6RrUaTyQrtggZ4wC5JZhzqJn86A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lots of selection.
