[{"Name":"Larry Teran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwSaedXZqxM3xPjg4Y8aScqAuZBvF4X1JZOzw_VoLyZdyDQa4-2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Let me start by saying that my experience hear has always been great! Denise is always welcoming when I walk in and Lina is such an awesome and kind hygienist. She explains every procedure and really makes sure you feel comfortable and well taken care of.

Dr. Pacheco and his staff are an amazing group of people that really care about you. They don't treat you  just like another patient, they treat you with care and kindness. I really appreciate the staff Dr. Pacheco has and I highly recommend you give Blue Door Dental 🪥 a try!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monique A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqQkmJJOheOqMrFbKJZ0oQpkZkJrkYprub53lE38C6mslpGjBAcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"New patient here and I have to say it was nice to visit an office where everyone was very welcoming. I can't remember the last time I had such a pleasant experience. Denise was super nice. She explained everything she going to do and told me if I had any issue with the procedure or anything to not be afraid to let them know. Dr. Pacheco came in a introduced himself and asked if I had any questions or concerns. Then proceeded with my exam. He explained what was going on with the findings of the x-ray and voiced his concerns about what should be done before things get worse. He was very nice and I appreciated it. Then I met with Lina, who was very nice and professional. She took her time with my cleaning and made sure I was doing okay the whole time. I appreciate that she didn't rush through and made my teeth looked and felt clean. If you're looking for a  nice clean office with friendly and professional staff, I definitely recommend Blue Door Dental. You won't be disappointed. Thank you for the wonderful service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKb9-zr4IWZoAnzhdjCKbg&fid=0x0:0xd651ce0b50d8c20c"],"When":"2025-9-10"},{"Name":"Erik Mejia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLRDT6w-32f8pu5jE2V5ttez4Ms78jFlyjgVxxgRcz-rLO1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"BlueBdoor Dental exceeded my expectations! The entire team is professional, welcoming, and truly cares about their patients. The office is clean, modern, and very comfortable. The dentist took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure I felt at ease throughout the visit. I never felt rushed, and the staff was friendly from start to finish. If you’re looking for quality dental care with outstanding customer service, I highly recommend BlueBdoor Dental!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ying Liang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRKgOGqtEKPpkTo8PoD9Op8tt3BnwKi8cEpUlvc4wsWAWGxug1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I didn’t think I would ever love a local dentist’s office as much as I do… but Blue Door is the best!

Most of the staff and patients have been here a while and it’s a testament to how Dr. Pacheco runs his practice. He’s definitely busy moving from patient to patient but he always makes time to explain what he does and answer. Dental care here is thorough and reasonably priced through my insurance.

The people are great. Denise, Lucy, Lina & Eleanor are so welcoming and fun! I always look forward to my appointments.

Billing and scheduling are a breeze with the office and they communicate well. I’ve been with Blue Door for the last year and a half since I moved to Pasadena. I’ve done routine cleaning, had chips in my teeth repaired, and just went through my aligner program. My smile and confidence has never been better! If you’re looking for a dental provider in the area, definitely take some time to check Blue Door out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqvZXIdD9eVXqIqMOXUBbk&fid=0x0:0xd651ce0b50d8c20c"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Cruz Sainz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJovvWA0NxZQYjcSs0V_tgQbjZAKbpXvwss5l8sqxho3oP9Lw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This dental office is incredible! I’ve only visited twice in the past week, and I can attest that this dentist deserves every amazing review. Choosing this location has truly been one of the best decisions. Dr. Pacheco and his team have provided such a welcoming experience in the past two visits. Many other dentist offices can often seem very intimidating and scary for the patient… not this one! Dr. Pacheco is incredibly professional by explaining every step with detail and encouraging you to ask questions. You can certainly tell he enjoys his work and very knowledgeable in it. I recently went in to get a crown placed and the entire procedure was a breeze. Lily (RDA) made the entire process a fun experience. She was extremely kind and personable in efforts to make the patient feel comfortable. If you are ever deciding on a new dentist location — this is the one!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer L.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4xpeR_ky4Fi7vWPHZYK5N16_bVSk0QrNR72YV4ByxxwIbeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Pacheco and his staff are outstanding and very helpful.  I recently had an issue getting information and Daisey called the company and we got results!  He is very thorough, skilled and his prices are not out of range.  I feel very happy to have this physician care for my needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dayle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk0QugkNv5SsAU0jr3--jBvi0BhPTyhpDVNABpJNLzIZVQzg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been looking for a new dentist in the Pasadena area and I’m glad I made time to schedule an appointment. Their team has been amazing throughout the entire process from the moment I scheduled to the actual appointment itself. The team has been very warm and welcoming. I felt very comfortable under their care. Dr. Pacheco and his team are awesome! The team does an amazing job not only providing care but also making you feel comfortable and at ease while walking you through it. I am so glad that I chose to get care at Blue Door Dental. I highly recommend for anyone who might be feeling a bit anxious or uncertain. They really take the time to help ground you and navigate
through each step of your care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peggy Tang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3RzlS7li_A8epZRFoCoX_lhU1-n4YX2vMz3TQKKuXdbqmNtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Blue Door Dental for the first time, and I was very impressed. My daughter brought me there, and right from the start the experience was welcoming and professional. The front-desk staff handled everything with excellent communication: they were courteous, patient, and efficient.

At my appointment, Dr. Pacheco explained every step clearly and in detail. He made sure I understood what was going on, what to expect, and why certain procedures were needed. That transparency put me at ease and helped me feel confident in the care I was receiving.

Overall, I couldn’t have asked for a better first visit. The friendly team, clear explanations, and warm atmosphere made all the difference. I highly recommend Blue Door Dental to anyone looking for a caring and professional dental practice!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Julie Han","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJtCfUuhjEDdp_nbCQlbouZzGHcFfaVdCwRQJtXwUSzxqIilw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a periodontal procedure done and was genuinely impressed with the level of care I received. Dr. Wyndhamsmith was professional, thorough, and explained what he was doing in a way that made me feel informed and confident throughout the process.

His assistant, Carmina, truly stood out. She was warm, attentive, and made a point to check in on my comfort the entire time. She has a very calming presence and went out of her way to put me at ease, which made a stressful appointment much more manageable.

The entire experience felt patient-centered and well-coordinated. I felt taken seriously, cared for, and never rushed. I would absolutely recommend this office to anyone needing periodontal care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJnklIzoURdjAeBq2CkflelFj_AlOi87o_HffG45msALdB1nQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I had gone to Dr. Joseph Kim for two different root canals over the last 12 years or so. I never had any problems with them, so when my general dentist thought I needed another, I wanted the right specialist to do it. I live on the west side, so I can’t use them for general dentistry any longer, but I always think of Dr. Kim if a root canal comes up.

Unfortunately, their staff is unprofessional, and inconsiderate of others’ time. They have no loyalty to customers who have come back to them over the years. Over the past month, they have failed to keep appointments. First, I made an appointment, was clear that I needed the root canal, and was driving from the west side and wanted it done the same day. They said that was no problem. When they called to confirm the day before, they said, “Oh no, it’s only a consult.” So they suggested we reschedule for two weeks later so the procedure could be done the same day. I was annoyed, but satisfied with them rescheduling.

They confirmed the appointment a couple of days ahead, and again I CONFIRMED - this was for the procedure. I even confirmed they received email correspondence from my dentist, and that is all they said they needed. So of course, I was surprised that upon arrival they said, “Oh no, he’s too busy today, we can only do the consult.” HUH?

What’s worse, when I asked to speak to someone higher, I was taken to the  administrators’ office. When I tried to explain what happened and how we had an appointment for the procedure, I was cut off, yelled at, and treated disrespectfully. I would not deal with this office. The administrator was extremely rude to me. They have no respect for your time. Even after all that, they still have no ability to admit that THEY MADE THE MISTAKE in scheduling.

If I had failed to show up for an appointment and didn’t cancel, they would surely charge me a no-show fee. Yet today, they FAILED to keep my scheduled appointment, which I confirmed three times. Where is the patient’s compensation for their clear mistake? Really disappointed, and what’s worse is I NEED THE TREATMENT, and now they’ve wasted the last month.

I do believe the doctors are good and do good work. Specifically I had two procedures from Dr. Joseph Kim and they have held up over the years with no issues. Just my opinion, but administrative personnel are not worth it. Or at least know that going into it and make sure you confirm everything and be very specific.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diego Zambrana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXvnGDobDGW3XyCgx2x7I9OS3UC-XR0r9mgWf6UGU45-XhtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Carmina was very nice and helpful showing me not only what she was doing with my teeth but explained why and what happens if I don’t. She showed me with the mirror and explained the before and after. She’s great!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alison Jernegan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMylE3vJVs3YUCBKIA2Mr7YLjMkGoDt-_vis2pQWTYk2hGN_KG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been coming here for many many years.  The doctors and staff are all friendly and happy!  Love Keisha and Carmena!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sheila Ann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRAji2JVlamQGaqut4G4D9xar85gDFT43AzbS9p96Nv5Er9mk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband been with this dental care office for many years… we’ll say approximately 14 years and over and I switch my dental care to this place as well.
I would say that the service is exceptional.
It’s clean and the staff is really friendly.
And dentist and professional staffs are very dedicated in what they do.
Very thorough and very good and what they do. Thank you for the service you guys provide for your patients.
Love the decor, you see all the achievements of the experts that works in these location and love the chair so comfy!
Did so much with this dental office and I would say they took good care of our needs. Thank you.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxn6PxSw&fid=0x0:0xbe7b67161e09e1b0"],"When":"2023-5-29"},{"Name":"Rodrigo Suárez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIf8H4I6ahe_v5iYHnLZJiRsQCiiwz8QcRXzkbJXacYyo50ow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"A very bad experience overall. The front desk staff is incredibly unprofessional, dismissive and rude. Don't expect any work to get done by anyone here except for a couple of the hygenists.
It's genuinely kind of shocking how much open contempt the staff has for the owners of the place, the management and the patients. Real risky to let such bad hires ruin your practice's reputation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Almaraz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIA0LJsZqsftq1MASf4CwAonCbRZTF4kXzq9sobxxmowMA85g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had some cavities that needed filling. I hate needles & the sound of drilling in my teeth but Dr. Farah and Carmina were so kind & professional. They really put me at ease and made a normally unpleasant procedure quick & easy, which I truly appreciate. They were great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Audrey Cedeño","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7fchQ96Ze8gsSv5EJ_o8MiBfcn773JPKv2JHlhf6h-SMWuBn5bQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Keisha and Dr. Wyndham Smith are absolutely phenomenal. They always take amazing care of my family and me. They are amazing individuals who advocate for their client's wants and needs. Thank you both for the years of amazing service. You have helped me overcome my dental anxiety and I am forever grateful for you both.
- Audrey Cedeño","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Armine Prutyan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcqw0WsjwA7JezYZObHU8ti178TyDMxQ3gYXckgL0hOi3dKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience at this dental office. From the moment I walked in, the staff was welcoming, professional, and attentive.
The dentist took the time to explain everything clearly, answered all my questions, and made sure I was comfortable throughout the entire visit. I truly appreciated how gentle and thorough the care was—no rushing, just genuine attention and expertise.

If you’re looking for a dental office that combines professionalism, kindness, and high-quality care, I highly recommend this practice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Giraldo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbLpX3vYBcVjuvxOn29y9nmwSCEpWtYxaXKiJA0PbZ9tgsCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been a patient of Dr. Alejandro for more than 10 years, and the quality of care he consistently provides is truly exceptional. We will definitely be back For all of our dental needs in the future, we found our dentist","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sophia Bautista","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3BGlMMhhwpNVxy2jlOqGhY3-1a5LtcSpELvbGDiUjw7KXkb54=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visiting from out of town and had a dental emergency. He prescribed meds to help get me through the weekend before he could see me early Monday morning. I went in thinking my filling fell out and ended up needing a root canal, which he preformed quickly and painlessly. I am so scared of dental work and Dr. Spero and his team made sure I was in no pain and was comfortable the entire time. This root canal was easier than fillings I've had with previous dentists, and so much less painful! The front desk is awesome and extremely kind, especially when discussing the financials. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Janine Osuch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIADxMhGOVT4YqJQoCqqC8FQfzaoLa8nt1QwBZ_VKtoj3AwxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I I have been going to this office for several years. Initially it was to have several extractions done and then ultimately to have implants and dentures done. Previous to this last visit everything and everyone were professional and very knowledgeable. I was very satisfied. However, For this last appointment, Things seem to have changed greatly. I called to make an appointment to have my dentures relined. I made it very clear that I needed a morning appointment so I could have the dentures back the same day or the next morning. The dentist and assistant had no clue why I was there. They cleaned the dentures. The dentist looked in my mouth and said everything was good. When I asked them about the reclining they were unaware of why I was there. They said I would need another appointment, which I agreed to. However, they said I would be without my dentures for 3 days. Totally unacceptable. I will not be back. I don't know what changed the quality of care here,but it is a loss for us.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mariam Khalatyan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRLJvbx4LSaOZgJbPWyzIvD7CiA2kRcb8OAiFLrlUDW_W2PA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing time at Dental Studio of Pasadena! The staff was super friendly and welcoming, and Dr. Mauricio was gentle and explained everything really well. His assistant Ani was also amazing - she made sure I was super comfortable the whole time.

The office was clean and modern, which made me feel even more at ease. They really make going to the dentist a breeze! They also provide me with some staff for my after-procedure oral hygiene!

I highly recommend them! ♥️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3naH_VA&fid=0x0:0xe9c064c9514ce21b"],"When":"2024-11-8"},{"Name":"L Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8AOJjZaNv00lEfl56_yIKtlyDq8McmiFcVqUq5zULSxe9-h9T=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough lovely things about this dental studio. Dr Mauricio has been working with me for months on a dental implant care journey and his assistant Annie have both been so lovely to visit. They walk me through everything for extra safety and security. Every session I have with them is timely, communicative, and really reassuring and the finishing results have been exemplary. I also want to shout out the staff who are so patient and accommodating and another helpful and knowledgeable doctor Angela who has helped me with many other services when I’ve visited.

It’s been such a good experience with them and it is so clear what a wonderful team this studio is. Every staff member I’ve spoken to has seemed to enjoy their job and the work culture behind the studio as well.

Very happy. ❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"An-Chi Powels","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBMwE3P8tmJqGb_Iksj2wfbvAq31IA6OyvTHwbHa-ZrxmU8A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to the office for my root canal procedure for the first time. I was impressed by the plush office and sophisticated dental equipment. I am also nervous about the procedure. But after I met Dr. Allen and Ani all the worries went away. They made sure I was comfortable with the whole process, and their professionalism is unparalleled.  I was never this impressed with a dental office visit.  I was very pleased.  The money is well spent. Unfortunately, Dr. Allen is a specialist.  I will never be able to see him again with general dental needs. Sad!  By the way, Dr. Allen sings too, with an incredible voice that relieved my nervousness.
I hope anyone seeking a specialist in dental needs will look up Dr. Allen and Ani. They are a great team.

An-Chi Powels
4/29/25","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susanna Gevorgyan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKD7IM8Div90nIKF69DhWiIn6Iyfn4ue25Na7PTEhtQJ-8dHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"absolutely love this dental office! From the moment you walk in, the staff is welcoming, professional, and incredibly kind. The office itself is clean, modern, and equipped with the latest technology, which makes every visit smooth and comfortable. The dentist is amazing—thorough, gentle, and genuinely cares about your oral health. They take the time to explain everything and make sure you’re comfortable every step of the way. I always leave feeling confident in my smile and grateful for such fantastic care. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bella Noguera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdWpeFDXhJzwgyZZxjfh8BjEdVh3_4F_ZUA5tEd7GiHecRx68=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have had an excellent experience for years at Dental Studio of Pasadena. Very professional, thorough and flexible with my schedule. I drive across town to come here. My mom is a retired dental assistant and she always mentions what a great office this is. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesh Soulease","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvwWMNpJ3UKoayoZiVOmniTvQJkePaCdGLx-25Eh6oV-Rf5vSUwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My first time experience was exceptional to say the least! The staff here made me feel right at home! They answered all
My questions and concerns with ease and patience! They were very informative of the procedures I needed to get done to where everything explained was clear and precise! Dr. Mauricio and Dr. Anni were super gentle and thorough! Griselda gives such a great teeth cleaning! Mari Lou guided the financing portion with such major ease, that I was confident in my decision making! I HIGHLY Recommend coming here if your looking for a great staff who loves what they do because it shows! Andrea at the front desk was also extremely helpful in setting up future appointments as well! Rest assured you’ll be treated well!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dianne Zelenak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwEQU1C4OkaiAeJila8fwof0iydTdFkLICjLGbl7-QWd2q3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience with Dental Studio of Pasadena!! Dr Angela & the entire staff are simply the best!! I was terrified as I had some serious dental issues. They created a plan just for me (which was not easy!) and I could not be happier!! They took care of my fears & my teeth every step of the way. They truly care more about the person & your dental health than anything else. If you’re a patient, you are truly family. I cannot recommend them highly enough!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Katherine Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdcqor4jW2AVi0c8cbHCFmIiFTgNKJswqTSWnY4L1QMWLY8ib5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Willow was hands down the best dental assistant that I have ever had — and I've had a lot of dental work over the years. She is caring, genuine, and thoughtful. I was scheduled for crown work and she was there every step of the way, ensuring that I understood the procedure, felt comfortable, and was under great care. Dr. Alex also made it clear that my decisions were up to me, at my pace. “Whatever makes you comfortable,” he said more than once. I have been a patient at this location under different dentists, assistants, and admin. I can say that now they have something good going on. Willow was prepared, diligent, and tremendously good natured and personable. It really transformed what would have been a somewhat painful experience to a really surprisingly positive one. Thank you, Willow, for being an excellent provider!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Enrique Mancilla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdt5IYiW91JlPhPW9SnzEocqgAYyJA8Tw-vMlQMRI-3U1oFgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm not usually one to leave reviews but Dr. Marout and Johnny genuinely deserved one. Left feeling like I was actually in good hands. If you're looking for a dentist in Pasadena, these are your people!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rouzanna Asatryan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtEIdKKgMODesZnw7SBYfAdeO91fT_MYq0JvxwiQpHSp44xmc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve always been scared of going to the dentist, but this was truly the best experience I’ve ever had, all thanks to Dr. Marout. I’m so grateful to have found a dentist I can trust. Dr. Marout is the only one I’ll go to! I am already looking forward to my next appointment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kimberly Castro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLBBTvmDhO0lexveMofH47B7hsz88V8a7vcKra5rxHmTiFf6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience was wonderful from start to finish. She explained everything clearly, broke down the costs for me, and made the process feel stress-free. She even scheduled my next visit right away to keep me on track. I truly felt cared for and supported.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ada Gudino Briseno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXA8ENsW_-7lLFGDPPEntemoPCyhf0YbCdjp3ZYiknAORB60phF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great experience at my appointment! The prices were also very affordable, which I really appreciated.\n\nI especially want to acknowledge Willow for making my visit amazing. She was so sweet, welcoming, and helpful throughout the entire appointment. Her kindness really stood out and made the experience even better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Alvarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIPw2ZVqcGOvbnLGGh2eVwgcnXvPVhAwTb6kEIkhrrpBciOaw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at this office. Dr. Marout was professional and explained my onlay treatment clearly. Johnny, the dental assistant, was very helpful and made the visit comfortable. Cleaning was thorough and everything felt straightforward and smooth. Everyone at the front desk was extremely friendly alongside Dr. Marout and Johnny!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MIRTHA CUADROS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJCnT4gc3opAUHqRR3LdIlnLCPZwu0GVQnfHEUHfpPJ-65aA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After contacted about 4 or 5 different dental offices in the area and being disappointed with all of them, I feel very fortunate I found Dentist of Pasadena on Lake. He’s one of a kind doctor, excellent professional, knowledgeable, and also very honest something rare to find these days. He made me feel comfortable with the whole process, targeting all my concerns and answering all my questions patiently, bottom line he fulfilled all my expectations for my dental issues and within my budget too,  which I do appreciate it very much. I’ll definitely recommend this dental office Dentist of Pasadena on Lake to my family and friends. If you’re looking for a dentist, don’t look further you won’t regret it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"LEONARDO VIATELA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWg37Xjl3arh66dXc_NriquluUoqjvNF67lpEMnAudkE2U8efLN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Iliana, RDH, is seriously a 10/10 at scaling and root planing (deep cleaning). Highly recommend her.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Incredibly gentle and precise with his work, every other dentist for me was a nightmare but Dr. Vasag is truly an incredibly talented dentist. Highly recommended for quality dental work!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cho Family","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdQWKH6dPBUUzsmbnAiI8DNUt7IqUbJOkjwrpQjHhI75n4PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. B is one of the most authentic and professionally competent person I have met. I made an appointment to fill some holes in my teeth. Although they were not bothersome, I didn't want it to become a bigger issue later on. He took his time to explain what is and not medically necessary and provided me with solid advice that was less intrusive to my long term dental health. Even if that solid advice takes away business from him, he is more interested in the wellbeing of his patients rather than short-term profit. He took the time to let me know the least expensive and most practical way to maintain my dental health and my cosmetic concerns. I am very grateful that he is my dentist and I hope he continues to thrive professionally and personally.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Weronika Cwir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURkRGFnjLWB30UWwEhz38vvtrmLyPuGWVIiBFARoaqpZsff_wp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This practice is staffed by a bunch of delightful tooth nerds. Dr Vivian and Lupe spent most time with me, but I also met with Drs B and D and their support staff, and every one of them was professional, friendly, and super happy to work with patients and answer questions. At the front desk, Nirvana goes out of her way to make scheduling easy and files insurance claims for the patient. Parking is easy, the office is clean and cheerful, I never had to sit in the waiting room, and Vroman's bookstore is within walking distance. Before becoming a patient here I absolutely dreaded dentists, and now I don't mind at all. Oh and they offer fluffy blankets if you get chilly and Dr Vivian takes playlist requests. Best dentist experience ever!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aide Zeraus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWswtIhuzCoSahkMWBCqTQbU1zcIoXlhK2HzLkfM2yLwaLP6GLz_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I definitely had a great experience at Prestige Dental. Starting with the staff, they were all very friendly and welcoming. I honestly wished I made them my primary dentist sooner. They explained everything to me very clearly. The doctor went over my teeth x-rays with me and it definitely felt like they genuinely care about their patients. I am very happy to have come here and I will 100% recommend this place to all my family, friends and acquaintances.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah Wandelt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWT9DcIr6ZUt5je0drvAyoCdVv0To6mu5JME0guRmuPIzBkbvmR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great dental care and super nice staff. I always get detailed information about the process, the state of my teeth, and what I can do to improve my dental hygiene. They don't push you for services that you don't really need, but are happy to help if you are interested in something specific. Everyone is so nice, it makes even getting your teeth cleaned a pleasant experience :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Pang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXavn_oLK-lOx14hYnFcej6K12Men7IGWwDT--1tgRBBF_1gOYpLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. B and his staff are awesome. I am recently paralyzed and they made accommodations to do my cleaning. I had my reclining wheelchair and the hygienist did my cleaning while standing up the whole time. I offered to transfer into their dental chair to make it easier for them but they told me to stay in my wheelchair. Even before my injury I liked going here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul m","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKP2Y6N5DNlW7GSbE1ccnUk8xNhLUBiXeZBtznP2vLmMv7-Bg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr B is a great, friendly and very informative and honest dentist and his hygienic and desk staff have always been top notch as well.  Was recommended here by a couple of friends from work and I have sent friends since.  Doesn't take my insurance anymore though, very sad, otherwise would have been with them forever","Images":null,"When":""}]

Rosas","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mindy Tittiger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKflhzVN0hTS_2fAmtp-0T1jR8QAOwK-WZnIbhKBhvRJ29EbA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An IM physician myself, I’m selective with my own doctors. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Seda Mesropyan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUusihr-3diU2XdsbUZ90kmj5FvXqPZSWZXH5yz3ubADxKu4lMa=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truly a five-star dental office!

Pasadena Family Cosmetic & Implant Dentistry is hands down one of the most professional, welcoming, and well run dental offices I’ve ever visited. From the moment you walk in, you’re greeted with warmth and genuine care. The front desk team is always friendly, efficient, and accommodating they go out of their way to make scheduling easy and to ensure every visit runs smoothly.

The office is immaculate, modern, and beautifully designed, creating a calm and relaxing environment that instantly puts you at ease. Their technology and equipment are top of the line, and you can tell they stay up to date with the latest in dental care and cosmetic advancements.

The entire staff works like a family  professional, kind, and always ready to help. Whether it’s a cleaning, cosmetic work, or a procedure, they take the time to explain everything clearly and make sure you’re completely comfortable.

What really stands out is the atmosphere of genuine care and compassion that runs throughout the office. They treat every patient like family, and that makes all the difference. My whole family comes here, including my kids, and we always leave with big smiles  literally and figuratively!

If you’re looking for a dental office that combines expertise, kindness, and the highest level of care, I highly recommend Pasadena Family Cosmetic & Implant Dentistry. It’s a place where you can trust that your smile is in the best hands.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNGVvw5FIXZZgIu-EV654H&fid=0x0:0x50160727319fee78"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Linsey Reyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcf67u6aCJB74nBYfEitudQISN8RKCw6g4M8KZB2aDu2gNeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this dentist! Clean and nice  facility! They always work to get all my teeth needs handled! I have been coming here for about 6 years! Originally when I was on the Delta HMO they were one of the few dentists that accepted my insurance in the area. I since have upgraded to the Delta PPO and stayed because I liked the practice and office.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"L C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0RSz1lcAMNGlak0h06xymHl8oSWGR0thZVsF6Ej0txvkjblQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been coming here for around 10 years now. My teeth have dramatically improved in health and apearance thanks to Dr. Karimyan. As for the periodontal staff, they are great. Most recently, the exceptional Wylene is fantastic and takes such great care of me. The office staff, headed by Edwin, the office manager, have been stellar. This is a great place to insure the health of your teeth. Laura C.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesikah Foxx","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLMamyE4blHElks9jO8IW9qfxlmLQA249OQPU9JGgS3IeMAYhzQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this Dentistry. Such amazing hospitality and care for all their patients. I do my preventative care with Dr. Wylene , who is super sweet and knowledgeable at what she does. I never had any issues with their service and/or treatments. Their office is very clean and organized with some of the best equipment to view your teeth. I highly recommend this location if you’re in the city of Pasadena. 🙂","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jackie Pagan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzsRKmnjdhk7tfeqH4bfqs1ea7yB9PDZe8EjYZETfS2cJ2kA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at my dentist’s office today for my regular cleaning and check-up. The team always does an excellent job checking the health of my teeth, and I’m very satisfied with the care I received. My hygienist was thorough and gentle, making the cleaning process smooth and comfortable.

I also really appreciate how detailed and transparent they are when it comes to explaining any additional costs not covered by my insurance no surprises, which is always a plus.

Highly recommend this dental office for anyone looking for quality care and professionalism.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeremie Carey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJomSJP04TiX9aZlShh-joNRSMYr7wtZrl4rRv7BDmTrJanww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough great things about Dr. Altina Karimyan and her wonderful team at Pasadena Family Cosmetic & Implant Dentistry. From the moment I walked in, everyone was extremely friendly, comforting, and patient.

I had a very traumatizing dental experience many years ago that left me terrified of going back to the dentist. Dr. Karimyan and her staff completely changed that for me. Before any procedure, they always made sure my comfort was the top priority, explaining everything clearly and checking in often.

Not only was the service itself amazing, but the entire experience has relieved me of my fear of going to the dentist. I left not only with great results, but also with a sense of ease I never thought I’d have in a dental office.

I would recommend Dr. Karimyan and her staff to anyone who values excellent customer service, gentle care, and outstanding results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paula Scott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRWpDrpFKE9VaQk3njtAJlwKIaZVVlrJHVUr2eKiuu329p-ZI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had quite a negative experience with this dental office. Waited a long time (about 1 hour) past the appointment time to see the dentist, the dentist took x-rays and said one tooth was badly decayed and a root canal and new crown were needed. We then had to wait another 45 minutes after the appointment to learn from the office manager what that might cost. We eventually left because we couldn’t wait any more and asked that they call us with those details. No call back came and multiple calls by me to try to follow up were unreturned. Feeling that this office was not great at patient communication we then went to another dentist for a second opinion and learned that the x-rays actually showed a silver filling, not a decayed tooth and no root canal or crown were needed, just a cleaning. Seems like a pretty huge mistake to make. We will not return here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lara Bank","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWNQ41c53H7HACRqNQJegqFxwArNEnd6QuzThvSaqN_vfzRWY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am so pleased with my deep cleanings. My gums were in bad shape and through dedicated patient care they are now in good shape and I am no longer worried about them. I will keep coming back here to be sure that my teeth are taken care of. The doctors and hygienists and staff are extraordinary. I have been a patient for many years and would not think of going anywhere else.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Casey Keating","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyNCNXmlJ1cx6yApRRETBHalnC02qWCLhqbLPbutJ6kC8IUKI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Word of mouth means a lot, especially when it comes to finding a good dentist.  I’ve been a patient of Green Street Dental in Pasadena the past several years.  Feeling welcome and understood is just as important as the services performed.  I had several issues that needed to be resolved with my teeth and gums.  Green Street Dental has excellent Dentists, Hygienists, Dental Assistants, and office staff that has elevated my level of dental health.  They have the latest technology and excellent referrals to specialists. A friendly, professional, and caring staff makes all the difference.  Dr. Zorapapel, Dr. Armour, Dr. Radley, Karen, Gracieth, and the rest of the staff, thank you.  And special thanks to Dental Assistant Kaitlin for the encouragement during dental procedures. Smile on everyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sonia Ayon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6Bl76paosvsSBDL48er1bfXyXL3TWcFspwjHRedHiO90qXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was referred to green street Dental by my insurance carrier for O.S consultation with Dr.Radley. I was a lil nervous and thanks to Mayra and Gigi my entire visit was relaxing and very pleasant. The entire team is extraordinarily professional and helpful with scheduling my upcoming appointment for the extraction of all of my wisdom teeth. They gave me all the necessary tips for my recovery process and answered all the questions I had. I strongly recommend them to anyone who is looking for dental needs for themselves or their family.. The office is in a good location,  plenty of parking and the waiting room is good vibe. Best wishes and blessings to everyone who cares to read my review.  : )","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPstkOoNEvBAwW2sQLlSvM&fid=0x0:0x7f5ee2a0b9901c68"],"When":"2025-8-2"},{"Name":"Hessler Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZZUacjyTP2tCyGjdlRcXuJPI6qT_M2XGE8afHkrUu6cCOe9C3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience thanks to the dental assistant Beverly. She was kind, attentive and had great scene of humor. She also worked efficiently with Dr. Nadia. Her friendly attitude allowed me to control my nerves. Highly recommended!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"hope white","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtWhOrP1I_5mMQnRHqOv706YVgFdiGNeBWk2S8cZwxFqItf2jR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience with Dr Radley and his assistant Kaitlin was amazing. I was very apprehensive at first my experiences with dentists weren’t that great, Dr Radley was professional, gentle, engaging and very compassionate. Kaitlin was attentive, personal, explaining each step with grace. As a team they were dynamic. Dr Radley used clear and concise language and replied with a thank you after each instrument was given. I felt safe, and  confident knowing I was in very capable hands. I highly recommend this team for your dental implant needs. Kaitlin  was the sweetest! Definitely a 5 out of 5!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bahan Zardakhsho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLosqPwrH0hG88ZWVe5EHmwmlbmjivdeiyWcFKhUj8eKReD9g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beverly is absolutely wonderful! She is professional, attentive, and genuinely caring. Every visit with her is comfortable and reassuring—she takes the time to explain things clearly and makes you feel at ease. Her warmth and expertise truly stand out, and I always leave feeling well cared for. Highly recommend Beverly to anyone looking for a compassionate and skilled dental professional!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bee Savage","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXetKXCkeBZctZi8DPxN6A-NB6zOS9T4VkxJvvdljcoW997F27IKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Green Street Dental is elite. Friendly vibes, zero anxiety, and a team that actually knows what they’re doing. Clean, modern office, no long waits.
S/o to the crew Beverly, Kaitlyn, Letty, Silvia, Dr. Karen and Dr.Nadia. Their better than a NASCAR pit crew. Oh'yeah.. and Mayra...
10/10, highly recommend. 🦷✨
Sincerely @BeeSavage","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBWXL6Dog0tU7YLNGrwOXwg&fid=0x0:0x7f5ee2a0b9901c68"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Ruth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqGvykTK5errEd5V6PEA54sTXIMD9E8tgg1jFQDNKIoxFzCg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend a Root Canal with Dr. Ana Meneses ENDODONTIST!  I had a root canal preparation,
she inserted an intracanal medicament into the cleaned-out tooth space.  I returned again in 2 weeks!  She is absolutely amazing!  The assistant Beverly helped me with all my questions as well.  They make a great team! Thank you for providing me the best care!  Green Street dental has amazing staff!  Very friendly and highly skilled!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wenda Friesner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGc2dVmHIzyn8coYTWDaR__hOM-nyaTMl-KPJSlQ3fjIQu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I broke a tooth last night and was able to get an appointment this afternoon. Dr.Nadia, Jatziry, Beverly and Katie all took great and friendly care of me, filed down the sharp piece of an exposed filling that was slicing my tongue, and helped me plan for procedures that need to before in the future. A very timely and productive visit!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Katherine Lardizabal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWj85JFnX50pazAdqNQ-atfSO3IuUghKOAxaTsZVQCg_iQ4HxFX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve come a few times now for cleaning and fillings. Dr. Lee is honest and upfront in his direction and plan to take care of your teeth. One thing I appreciate is I never feel like I am being sold to have more procedures or work just for the money. I truly feel like he only recommends it if it’s really needed. The front desk is extremely helpful too. They are so sweet and accommodating.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charline a Javier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJa8ig8uZtOVDyDMyvKBJoBhMGiUG-LHSltw-8HP-PssWW5s1w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The most amazing dental experience, all around. I needed emergency work done and they got me in as soon as we could. Dr. Lee and his team were so kind in explaining the whole process to me and wanted to be 100% sure of all treatments necessary. They’re fully transparent when it comes to finances, instruction and how they do things in this office. The front office is very comforting and doesn’t make you feel like you’re even in for dental work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Won Jung Yoo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzXT2ePeWNOt5VNlWOVLUSBA-FUkTUgMcABC_ctTDKvGzaPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Lee is very nice. He's very thorough in his practice and makes sure his patients feel comfortable. The staff is also very nice. They were very flexible when I had to change my schedule.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Vasquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLuEHWI-TvI6j9sTDb2WaNfm4Dy5c0OTqEeIWAkv7DfVDulGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am so grateful for their service. I was in excruciating pain for 3 days right before Christmas Eve I called every dental surgeon near the area and even though of driving to Mexico to find someone to do an emergency extraction of my wisdom tooth I am 33 weeks pregnant and the pain was so unbearable I had not slept or ate and was putting my baby in distress. On Christmas Day I began calling all the near by dentals offices again hoping to have an answer and God blessed me with Dr .Lee . He scheduled me an emergency appointment and when I  arrived I was there for about 30 minutes the procedure took about 10 min at most. NO PAIN. I felt safe and understood . Went home and received a follow up call the very next morning to check on how I was doing. I can not express my gratitude  and how much it meant for me  for him to be the  only doctor in LA and so rounding counties to take me in on Xmas day and help me be pain free. service was absolutely amazing  and quick ! I know where to go when I need any dental procedure done. Thank you so much for your practice and kindness!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"norma urias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIjMQzF3XL9T2LTNAv6z-zakFzcdpr4zYO2DHgQXUky027baQm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Lee and his staff are amazing. I brought my mom a few weeks ago for horrible toothache. Mind you they saw her the same day I called. His assistant Maria was beyond helpful and was so empathetic to my mom. Dr. Lee was very informative and he did an amazing job.Today, my daughter is here for her wisdom teeth exam and removal. Sue, Irma and Maria were amazing and sweet. All went well, as I anticipated. I will refer my friends and family. Thank you team.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEL28uK2_mvu0iAE&fid=0x0:0xa83737fb4f0bd0d3"],"When":"2025-5-14"},{"Name":"Kirk J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3MFu65f36az7tgFctjjzlOsdXYvRgV2ZiNs3MWG0e-CwaZqgy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Lee and his staff are some of the most thorough, kind, professional, and personable people I have met in any field of medical care. Dr. Lee is comprehensive in his care and takes meticulous notes, making sure I am aware of all options. All of this gives me peace of mind, and that’s priceless.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacky Silva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDTMXZtkuVQlO05tSR9e8e4grMPli3khcVvkwLvmi4bRg42eQi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I honestly don’t have enough words to express how thankful I am for Dr. Joshua Lee and his amazing team. This was one of the most emotional and personal experiences I’ve ever had at a dental office. I came in so scared and worried that I might lose my tooth. Every other endodontist/periodontist I saw told me the only option was an implant. As someone who is still young, the idea of losing a tooth at my age was heartbreaking. I just couldn’t accept that.
But then I found Dr.Joshua Lee. He was the only one who truly listened, who didn’t just see me as a patient but as family. He believed in a different outcome when no one else did. With his experience, dedication, and compassion, he saved my tooth, something I didn’t think was even possible at that point. His kindness, patience, and the way he genuinely cared made all the difference. He explained everything in detail, made sure I felt safe and informed every step of the way. Without a doubt, Dr. Joshua Lee is one of the best dentists I’ve ever been to. And I have to give a huge shoutout to Irma, Sue, Sadie and Maria. From the second I walked in, they made me feel like I was in the right place. Their warmth, kindness, and support turned a nervous experience into something full of hope. Now, I can smile again, like really smile with confidence. I look in the mirror and feel so grateful I could cry. What Dr. Joshua Lee did for me isn’t just about saving a tooth. It’s about giving me back my confidence, my peace of mind, and a part of myself I was so afraid I’d lose. And I have to share something personal. While I was sitting in the waiting room, I noticed the book of Psalms and the book of Proverbs on the coffee table that revealed to me that God was telling me, “You’re in the right place.” It was so powerful and comforting. I believe with all my heart that I was led here for a reason. What happened that day wasn’t just a dental visit, it was healing on many levels. If you’re looking for a dental office that combines expert care with genuine compassion and heart, look no further. Dr. Joshua Lee and his team are a blessing. I’m so beyond grateful. 🤍🦷🥹","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAziHLboO5haAVD8aI3mJs&fid=0x0:0xa83737fb4f0bd0d3"],"When":"2025-6-20"},{"Name":"Strawberry Guy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDkx1fs8MpwlefHT1gOgtUIYfE05RzB0BDFd6YHeEw3r-8E9Ns=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got my wisdom teeth removed last year..

The dentist did such a good job I barely even noticed my teeth were gone (10/10 sorcery), and the recovery was smoother than my brain on the anesthesia..

Special shoutout to the absolute kweens at the front desk truly holding the whole operation together with good vibes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAitNCs9WH9ywZvyj4hCG8I&fid=0x0:0xa83737fb4f0bd0d3"],"When":"2026-1-14"}]

[{"Name":"Gracie J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5Z6uhjv8x_fkGpljVbIdyJEp8nzMbBozOXDoCx_-VLAUOJ4JY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had such a great experience at South Lake Dental for my first dentist visit in 3 years! Everyone was very warm and welcoming. The tech who took my X-rays, my hygienist Claudia, and Dr. Balikyan were all very thorough and knowledgeable, as well as very kind throughout the process. My husband and I are glad to have found this dentist and we will be continuing with them for as long as we can!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Narine Kiradjian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN6sNVfRR5SUcue0J7czRNH-NRRiJ_WPHWZFnC-RQrfX5KqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment you park your car in a large parking lot right in front of this beutiful dental office, you set high expectations. Starting with nice welcome  smiles from employees. Waiting area was modern and spotless clean, they definitely value  hygiene in here. Office was busy, but you couldn't here loud voices. My next position  impression-professional environment. Not too long after  I met Dr. Balikyan. He made me feel very comfortable, explained plan of care, he didn't  rush, didn't sell and made me feel important. But his skills is the reason I am writing this review. My case was complicated, but he handled  just fine. Going to dental office is not my favorite think to do. But if necessary, I found Dr. Balikyan. Thank you very much for my positive experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Ellison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5llczZepqqeakPenIqVOZIue3QPfjSLIg6EzQVaWhp1eYHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Being new to the area, we did our research by walking into 3 dental offices to see how we were greeted by the staff and how they answered our questions. South Lake Dental was our choice! First off, my husband entered the wrong door and the Dentist, Michael Balikyan, was very friendly and showed him the receptionist desk. Both of the women at the front desk were extremely kind and helpful. The office is very clean, well run, and state of the art. Michael Balikyan, DDS, does not try to push any extra dental procedures and his staff are all very personable. It is a well run office!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aleta Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKE0rNFPJCLSxNog4Ovh4jt-VlF08tQqoStLhzkYK1IxJgVSpK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The front desk staff is very friendly and helpful, Pat and Noemi (?) get 5 stars ☺
My dehtal hygienist Hilda is very detailed in doing dental procedures and communicates good suggestions to improve my dental issues.
Dr. B is a blessing:  always friendly and pleasant.
I have been going to So.Lake Dental for decades and altho some staff members are new, thay are excellent.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIICSEeKLbzq-nRWPpJDXet5EV4zwfzo-oNaMGwh8E5RwrrvA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My hygienist Erica was gentle and knowledgeable. Caught some issues before they became big problems and provided appropriate recommendations. She always makes my visits painless!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tina C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDu-yFYAO0yi6pC5NghcN9S3xcOCchoaSBd8OZJ-NKyIn2ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been going to South Lake Dental for a number of years. Dr. Balikiyan and his team are the best! Always professional and never pushy, they take the time to talk to you and explain what's going on. I love this place, because they don't try to push unnecessary procedures on you. Their new office, which it's just a few doors up from the old location, is very nice, modern and spacious. Wonderful and friendly staff!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maria Isabel Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJu0xKzo9Qrjf05W7UJ9Cj8Qrr-cO-zG5oBsVWUkZ3kyCCIXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The doctor and all the staff were very kind; they treated me with courtesy and respect. I felt very comfortable and decided to have my entire treatment with them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jackie Shahverdian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJVFw-opDSBUnNjRuvdYhLBfpHtD2I4hpSSVmDam_QaEZdkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent care from Dr. Balikyan at South Lake Dental. Friendly staff, clean office, and a great overall experience","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Bessie Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJEqkRutBs1f27SGWCJQcoxkYHP2ntKBIbcjs_RxN6QGlOn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"3 things i appreciate about this clinic, especially comparing to the other Pasadena clinic I've tried:  1. they care about the patients; 2. they are willing to spend time to explain/discuss; 3. the doctors, not assistants, perform the services.\nYes it's a bit of waiting but given the time they spend with me, I think it's still worth the wait.  Regarding quality of service, will wait and see.  I just got 2 fillings.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Azizi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIyWSgOWf3oF1bACF-MrZfmixrpu0NRZna3EPtHa63oWsrINQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Extremely disappointing experience. I had a 2:00 PM appointment and arrived early at 1:30 PM, expecting that would give the staff plenty of time to prepare. Instead, I wasn’t even called in until around 2:25. Once I was finally taken back, I was told they needed additional X-rays due to some approval issues. To make matters worse, I was then informed that the doctor couldn’t perform white fillings—something that should’ve been communicated ahead of time. Overall, the experience felt disorganized and unprofessional. I won’t be returning.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abbi Aksamit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCVrwkz12d75LmTi6CAfXboIqdTCDiz0ASjBsoEMBFvmECx5e3=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"So I had a dental emergency and I chose this place because it was close to my house. They extracted that tooth no problem so I went back for the other dental issues I had. They messed up my root canal which my current dentist is now having to fix. They told me I had to get oral surgery to even get a crown on the root canal they messed up which turned out not to be true. The fillings they did were awful quality. And I avoided the dentist for a year and a half after my experience with them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jasmine Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrCXWC5uMWlG8gyn0HS2OKsIxRb7RGMI3XvwZu9J2TyZnUZolh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t understand what the point of booking a routine check up appointment over 3 weeks ago, and then arriving on time to that appointment but it takes an entire hour to be seen? On top of that it takes 40 minutes for the X-rays and the cleaning. I’m definitely contacting my insurance to switch dentists, will not be back. It’s so inconsiderate to waste people’s time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bryan P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9hqyaNOfedXkskg8j-EIuN_GSn8sK9fgtrhiU0Dx2zURfcA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you enjoy your time and money being wasted and spat out in forms of mistreated and neglected problems then you’ve approached the right place. Not only has this location failed to find 2 missing cavities of mine but they’ve also done a horrendous job at basic cleanup. A few of the staff were genuine and cool but the dentists were very careless and almost callous to my needs. They failed to recognize issues I’ve had with my teeth it wasn’t until going to another dental office where those problems were recognized. Not only that but the cleaning at this location was very rushed. I’d go to this location various times throughout the years but it wasn’t until recently the quality of service seemingly went downhill. It’s sad to say this because the people there were genuinely cool to talk to but I’m hoping they at least improve their procedures and at least double check issues with their clients.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elisa Mayer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqdptl6rA8k814tAg0ttT_jJW6_4Kob9PbuFUXmTNv_c284Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my first visit on 2/1/19 to have the first quadrant of teeth removed due to preparation for full mouth dentures. So every 2 weeks a quadrant was removed. So by 4/1/19 they were all removed. I had done some research and found out that the longer I waited the more the bone \u0026 gums would shrink and when everything had finally finished all the shrinking the end result would be a tighter better fitting set of dentures so I wouldn’t have to use much or any denture cream. I finally received the finished set and found that indeed I don’t have to use but a very small amount of cream and they look so natural and not all bulky \u0026 thick. I’m pleased with the outcome. I’m so glad that I followed the research I found \u0026 waited a whole year to do the impressions. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND fair oaks family dental to anyone for any dental services.  Thank You!! Fair Oaks Family Dental For Giving Me Back A Fantastic Smile 😁","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Gies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4bdIFrlB-YK3z7II_h8ustwlAfyi5w0ztaNpJEFBJ2xMwk70L=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst dental practice I've ever visited. It didn't look or feel clean, for starters, and it went downhill from there. All kinds of inappropriate questions on the paperwork--and then my answers were ignored anyway. I know that acid reflux causes enamel deterioration, but the dentist tried to convince me that I grind my teeth and then tried to upsell me into a mouth guard I know I do not need. Took what seemed like too many x-rays. Padding the insurance bill?? The assistant kept saying \"sorry\" every 15 seconds--great way to increase my confidence in her work. She also left green mint polishing paste on my face when she was done with the very poor job she performed. And what dentist's office doesn't give you a new toothbrush when you leave? (Answer: Family Dental.) Never going back here. I'm not the kind of person to bother taking the time to slam a business with a review like this, but this is warranted.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKKiPrH3QxgTnHmBmP9MMTr7LjiSXXTFPGmlKN_9-d6nTjSvOE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I after the first visit, I try to have an open mind. I said to myself give it a chance it might be the first bad experience next visit might be better. It did not get better with each visit things just came out revealed that were disgusting. First of all the dentist and the hygienist come in looking like they just left the gym they’re dress in spandex like that. They drop the tools while they’re working on the patient pick it up and continue.   They had to prescribe antibiotics because of the unclean practices.","Images":null,"When":""}]
